Title: Improvements in or relating to Electronic Systems and Apparatus for Recognising Printed Characters.
Abstract: 1,170,234. Character recognition. NATIONAL RESEARCH DEVELOPMENT CORP. 14 Nov., 1966 [12 Nov., 1965], No. 48171/65. Heading G4R. Character recognition apparatus multiplies together relatively delayed versions of an analogue signal waveform derived from a raster scan of the character, to obtain analogue shape feature indicating signals which are then combined to identify the character such that a given character is indicated only if the correct shape features occur in the correct physical disposition relative to each other. Referring to Figs. 4, 5, the waveform from a raster of vertical scans of the character to be identified is amplified logarithmically at 14 and applied to delay lines DL1-DL9 as shown. Each delay line DL1-DL4 has a delay of four scan lines and each delay line DL5-DL9 of one scan line. Tappings on lines DL5-DL9 feed adders ADR1-ADRn to recognize geometric features, e.g. straight and curved lines in various orientations. The adders feed " blur " filters BF1-BFn via antilog amplifiers ALA1- ALAn. The blur filters are low-pass filters for broadening the signal peaks to allow for circuit noise and variations in ink density. The blur filters feed weighting and combining networks CNl-CNn, one per possible character, via delays DM1 &c. which serve to bring feature signals derived from different parts of the character to the appropriate weighting and combining network simultaneously. The largest network output is selected as identifying the character. In a modification (Figs. 6, 7, not shown), blurring and combining is done in delay lines, one per possible character. Each delay line receives the outputs of several of the antilog amplifiers of Fig. 4 which are applied to respective positions along its length. Three taps, one scan time apart, on each line feed a summer respective to the line (to provide blurring between adjacent scans). Blurring along each scan is provided by limiting the response bandwidth of the delay lines. The summer outputs are gated (except during scan fly-back) to respective peak detectors, the largest output of which is selected to identify the character under control of a validity check circuit which can also produce a reject signal. In addition, the largest of the gated summer outputs is filtered to remove transients, then differentiated before being passed to two Schmitt triggers which produce outputs on positive-to-negative and negative-to-positive zero-crossings respectively. These outputs indicate the reaching of the best time to sample the previous signals to identify the character, and the " boundary " between successive characters respectively. The validity check circuit utilizes pulse lengtheners, storage triggers and logic circuitry to perform checks on the relative timing of these signals in dependence on predetermined maximum and minimum character widths. The delay lines of Fig. 5 may be eliminated by suitable choice of the tappings on those of Fig. 4.
Keywords: ["signals combined identify", "blur", "dl4 delay scan", "blur filters bf1", "character recognition apparatus"]

Title: INFORMATION RETRIEVAL SYSTEM

Title: VOICE SYNTHESIZING MAIL SYSTEM
Abstract: PURPOSE:To directly and naturally transmit transmitter's feelings to a receiver as voice by controlling a voice synthesizing parameter to be used at the time of outputting a voice in accordance with codes stored in a face dictionary or the like or character codes such as 'desu/masu' (the end of a Japanese sentence) style. CONSTITUTION:Data transmitted from the transmission side are inputted to a transmitting/receiving part 3 and temporarily stored in a storage part 2 through a control part 4. An analyzing part 5 searches whether a code indicated in the shown code part is included in the stored data or not through the control part 4. A searched result of the analyzing part 5 is converted into a parameter while referring the shown table and the parameter is transmitted to a voice synthesizing part 6. The synthesizing part 6 reads out data other than codes stored in the storage part 2 and synthesizes a voice while changing the level or intonation of the voice to be synthesized in accordance with the parameter by using the searched result of the analyzing part 5 and the synthesized voice result is outputted from a voice output part 8 through the control part 4.

Title: NEURAL NETWORK USING MEMBERSHIP FUNCTION AND ITS LEARNING SYSTEM
Abstract: PURPOSE:To simplify the learning of a neural network and also to facilitate the connection weight analysis by adding a membership function attaining layer between an input layer and a medium layer and setting previously the weight of the network connection and the neuron threshold value at the part of the membership function attaining layer. CONSTITUTION:A neural network includes an input layer 10 serving as a branch unit, a medium layer 12 of a double layer structure using a neuron, and an output layer 14. Then a membership function attaining layer 16 is added between both layers 10 and 12. The layer 16 consists of a 1st layer of a neuron having a sigmoid function as a nonlinear function and a 2nd layer having a neuron having a linear function. The layer 12 consists of the 3rd and 4th layers, and each neuron of the layer 16 approximates the small, medium and large membership functions.

Title: A directional element
Abstract: A directional element (40) which produces a quantity ζo related to the zero sequence source impedance of a power system relative to the location of the directional element (40), from values of zero sequence current (IR) and an adjusted value of zero sequence voltage (3Vo). The impedance quantity (ζo) is then compared against first and second threshold quantities (ZOF and ZOR) to identify the direction of a fault. Further, the zero sequence voltage-polarized directional element can be combined with other individual directional elements, induding a zero sequence current-polarized directional element and a negative sequence voltage-polarized directional element to form a universal directional element for unbalanced faults, in which the individual directional elements operate in a particular sequence, with the other directional elements being blocked from operating if a prior directional element in the sequence provides a direction indication.

Title: Pattern-recognition computing and method for producing same
Abstract: Pattern-recognition computing can be accomplished using wave-type or other types of energy. In pattern-recognition computing which uses a plurality of wave-type energy input patterns modulated with quantized information, energy from the patterns combines to produce interference-based dynamic images. Component parts of a dynamic image are separated and recombined to produce logic and other computing process outputs. To produce a coordinated set of optics for pattern-recognition computing, waveforms at pixel-sized image components of the dynamic image are chosen to become contributors to the combined output if they will contribute (or can be modified to contribute) in a positive manner to a combined output waveform that obeys the logic rules of the device being produced. Iterative changes in input pattern characteristics are used to optimize the coordinated optics. Pattern-recognition computing can also use special interference and frequency-multiplexed logic.
Keywords: ["recognition computing", "interference based dynamic", "waveforms pixel", "energy input patterns", "set optics pattern"]

Title: Automatic, multi-stage rich-media content creation using a framework based digital workflow - systems, methods and program products
Abstract: An automatic, multi-stage rich media content creation system includes a network based server executing an operating system, a text editing program, typically XML editor, and an authoring or batch processing program for combining Rich Media in a Multimedia Vehicle Repository (MVR) file. Video, stills, panoramas, sound, film, etc are combined as raw Rich Media from one or more sources and transmitted to the server in a framework over a digital network. The raw Rich Media is incorporated into the framework as a series of related frames. The raw Rich Media is stored on a storage device, typically a disk at the network based server. A creator using a standard graphical or text editing tools has access to the raw media assets on the disk for preparing a textual specification description, typically XML in an electronic template of desired Rich Media content. The template and raw media assets are transmitted by the creator to the server for combining the raw media assets and the XML textual specification in the template as a composed MVR file using the batch-processing program. The composed MVR file and textual specification may be returned to the creator for further editing of the specification, if necessary, and/or stored on the server disk for access by other creators. The template based, composed or edited MVR file of Rich Media content and related textual specification can be transmitted to other servers on the network for automatic, multistage creation of Rich Media content by several user groups. One user group can create a template based, composed or edited MVR file which another group accesses via the network to inject other content into the template for revising the XML text specification to create another embodiment of the Rich Media content.
Keywords: ["media multimedia", "mvr file rich", "network raw rich", "content creation", "file textual specification"]

Title: Sector capacity prediction
Abstract: Infrastructure network service measurements are used to determine sector capacity, or the like, in a wireless network. The embodiments use a linear regression to predict current usage and/or capacity of the radio-frequency link resources between wireless subscribers and wireless base stations, for example, as an indication of when the link is incapable of supporting additional subscribers. The determination of resource capacity can be refined down to the sector-carrier level (a single carrier within a base station sector). The prediction can be cast in terms of time, which allows network service providers to plan the growth of their base stations to meet subscriber needs. Metrics derived from the regression, such as line slope, also provide useful information about usage and performance.
Keywords: ["allows network service", "predict current usage", "regression", "subscribers wireless base", "determine sector capacity"]

Title: - -1023- - Repetitive-1023-sequence echo-cancellation reference signal for single-carrier digital television broadcast systems
Abstract: PURPOSE: A repetition-PN1023-sequence echo-cancellation reference signal for a single-carrier digital television broadcasting system is provided to easily perform adaptive equalization in DTV receivers for training signals, thereby compensating imperfection of DTV signals received via phase transmissions and cable transmissions. CONSTITUTION: A transmitter(01) includes an existing packet assembler(02). The packet assembler(02) is connected to supply data streams assembled in a data randomizer(03). The data randomizer(03) performs an exclusive OR operation for all incoming data and PN sequences. The data randomizer(03) is connected to supply randomized data to a byte assembler(04). The byte assembler(04) is connected to supply randomized data with 8-bit bytes to a reed-solomon encoder(05). The reed-solomon encoder(05) is connected to a convolutional interleaver(06) to supply bytes of the randomized data having inserted forward-error-correction codes. The convolutional interleaver(06) supplies bytes of interleaved data showing data segments of an interleaved data field.

Title: Frequency-dependent magnitude pre-distortion of non-baseband input signals for reducing spurious emissions in communication networks
Abstract: Pre-distortion, whose magnitude- and preferably phase- are frequency-dependent, is applied to a non-baseband input signal in order to reduce spurious emissions resulting from subsequent amplification of the signal. In preferred embodiments, the pre-distortion technique of the present invention is implemented in combination with the (frequency-independent) magnitude and phase pre-distortion technique described in U.S. patent application Ser. No. 09/395,490 ("the '490 application"), where the frequency-dependent pre-distortion corresponds to amplifier distortion that has a magnitude that is proportional to the frequency offset from the carrier frequency and a phase shift of ±90° on either side of the carrier frequency. Since these characteristics match those of a differentiator, a thorough correction of this part of the amplifier's distortion can be achieved using a differentiating circuit. Embodiments of the present invention may be implemented in the RF domain. Implementations may also be based on look-up tables that are adaptively updated to ensure optimal performance over time.
Keywords: ["amplification signal preferred", "distortion technique described", "thorough correction amplifier", "amplifier distortion magnitude", "phase pre distortion"]

Title: ANALOG NEURONS AND NEUROSYNAPTIC NETWORKS
Abstract: An analog neural computing medium, neuron and neural networks comprising same are disclosed. The neural computing medium includes a phase change material that has the ability to cumulatively respond to multiple synchronous or asynchronous input signals. The introduction of input signals induces transformations among a plurality of accumulation states of the disclosed neural computing medium. The accumulation states are characterized by a high electrical resistance that is substantially identical for all accumulation states. The high electrical resistance prevents the neural computing medium from transmitting signals. Upon cumulative receipt of energy from one or more input signals that equals or exceeds a threshold value, the neural computing medium fires by transforming to a low resistance state that is capable of transmitting signals. The neural computing medium thus closely mimics the neurosynaptic function of a biological neuron. The disclosed neural computing medium may also be configured to perform a weighting function whereby it weights incoming signals and transmits modified signals. The neural computing medium may thus be configured to provide an accumulation function or weighting function and may readily be reconfigured from one function to the other. The disclosed neurons may also include activation units for further transforming signals transmitted by the accumulation units according to a mathematical operation. The artificial neurons, weighting units, accumulation units and activation units may be connected in a variety of ways to form artificial neural networks. Embodiments of several neural networks are disclosed.
Keywords: ["neurons weighting", "form artificial neural", "prevents neural computing", "biological neuron disclosed", "signals neural computing"]

Title: Neural network system and method for controlling information output based on user feedback
Abstract: A system and method for controlling information output based on user feedback about the information is provided that comprises a plurality of information sources providing information. The information sources may be electronic mail providers, chat participants, or page links. At least one neural network module selects one or more of a plurality of objects to receive information from the plurality of information sources based at least in part on a plurality of inputs and a plurality of weight values during that epoch. At least one server, associated with the neural network module, provides one or more of the objects to a plurality of recipients. The objects may comprise electronic mail messages, chat participants viewers, or slots within a link directory page. The recipients provide feedback about the information during an epoch. At the conclusion of an epoch, the neural network takes all of the feedback that has been provided from the recipients and generates a rating value for each of the plurality of objects. Based on the rating value and the selections made, the neural network redetermines the weight values within the network. The neural network then selects the objects to receive information during a subsequent epoch using the redetermined weight values and the inputs for that subsequent epoch.

Title: Non-standard knowledge acquisition method used for constructing mechanical product design knowledge base
Abstract: The invention discloses a method for obtaining irregular knowledge used for constructing a mechanical product design knowledge base. Aiming at the requirements for knowledge processing and knowledge base system development in the mechanical product design field, the invention defines the irregular knowledge, discloses a computation module for dividing irregular knowledge granularity by adopting granularity calculation principle, studies mechanical product design irregular knowledge base structure system and basic format, discloses an irregular knowledge base display method based on metadata, and invents a method for obtaining semantic matching, irregular knowledge base in serial data source, and multi-mode irregular knowledge based on irregular example knowledge obtaining of cluster analysis; and on the basis, designs a system frame and a prototype software system for mechanical product design knowledge base system construction and application. The invention can be used to solve the technical problem of treating irregular knowledge in an information processing system such as CAD (computer-aided design), CAM (computer-aided manufacturing), CAE (computer-aided engineering) or PDM (products data management) in manufacturing industry, so as to satisfy the requirements for the deepening development of the manufacturing industry information project technology.

Title: METHODS AND APPARATUS FOR GRAPHICAL OBJECT IMPLEMENTATION
Abstract: A system displays a graphical element in a graphical user interface, and receives a command to display the at least one graphical sub-element associated with the graphical element. The system replaces the display of the graphical element with a display of at least one graphical sub-element associated with the graphical element, and implements the graphical sub-element such that execution of the graphical element invokes execution of the graphical sub-element associated with the graphical element.

Title: Floatation-volume adequacy determining system and floatation-volume adequacy determining method
Abstract: A floatation-volume adequacy determining system (1) includes a receiving unit (4); an image processor (8b); an adequacy determining unit (8c); and a display unit (6). The receiving unit (4) receives an actual image that is taken by a capsule medical apparatus (10) that is floating in a liquid (2) in the direction toward the liquid level. The image processing unit (8b) generates a determination reference image that represents an adequate range of a floatation volume of the capsule medical apparatus (10) adjusted to the actual image that is taken by the capsule medical apparatus (10). An adequacy determining unit (8c) compares the determination reference image and the actual image with each other and determines whether the floatation volume of the capsule medical apparatus (10) is adequate. The display unit (6) displays a result of determining whether the floatation volume of the capsule medical apparatus (10) is adequate.

Title: Medical image diagnosing system and diagnosing method based on migrated nuclear matching tracing
Abstract: The invention discloses a medical image diagnosing system and a diagnosing method based on migrated nuclear matching tracing. The whole system comprises an image preprocessing module, an image feature extracting module, an image migrated nuclear matching tracing diagnosing module and an image unidentified sample testing module. The image preprocessing module completes the redundancy removal of original images and the equalization strengthening processing of histograms. The processed images are extracted to obtain gray level cooccurrencematrixes, Hu matrixes, and Brushlet and Contourlet features as a sample set, thus a source field, a target filed identified training sample set and a target filed unidentified training sample set are obtained. The migrated nuclear matching tracing learning is carried out on the source field and the target filed identified training sample set, thus a refreshed target field training sample set and a training classifier are obtained. The training classifier is used for classifying and diagnosing the unidentified testing samples and outputting final diagnosing results. The invention can relieve the defect that the quantity of medical reference samples is few, effectively enhance the medical image diagnosing identification rate and can be used for assisting the clinical diagnosing of medical images.
Keywords: ["histograms processed images", "training sample", "classifying diagnosing unidentified", "medical image", "nuclear matching tracing"]

Title: COMPUTER-ACCESSIBLE MEDIUM, SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR ASSESSING EFFECT OF A STIMULUS USING INTERSUBJECT CORRELATION
Abstract: Exemplary embodiments of a system and method can be provided for measuring a level and/or details of how engaging, effective or memorable a stimulus that may be based on information associated with one or more subjects' neuronal, physiological and/or behavioral responses to the stimulus. In addition, an exemplary embodiment of a computer-accessible medium containing executable instructions thereon can also be provided which can be executed by a processing arrangement. For example, when the processing arrangement executes the instructions, the processing arrangement can be configured to, e.g., receive neuronal, physiological and/or behavioral data one or more subjects being presented with stimuli, determine further data associated with a measure of inter-subject similarity of the neuronal, physiological and/or behavioral data, and identify particular portions of the stimuli that meet a pre-determined criteria relating to the further data associated with the measure of inter-subject similarity. In addition,the processing arrangement can be further configured to display and/or store identifiers of the particular portions of the stimuli in a storage arrangement in a user-accessible format and/or a user-readable format.

Title: METHOD FOR PILOTING A ROTARY-WING DRONE WITH AUTOMATIC HOVERING-FLIGHT STABILISATION
Abstract: The method of the invention can particularly be used for piloting radio-controlled toys and comprises the following operations: fitting the drone with a telemeter and a video camera; acquiring the altitude of the drone relative to the ground using the telemeter; acquiring the horizontal speed of the drone; and automatically stabilising the drone in a hovering flight by controlling the vertical thrust force of the drone in order to stabilise the altitude acquired by the telemeter and by controlling the horizontal thrust force of the drone so as to cancel the horizontal speed. The video camera is a front sight camera directed towards the front of the drone, and the horizontal speed of the drone is acquired from a plurality of video images taken by said front sight camera.
Keywords: ["altitude drone", "drone horizontal speed", "automatically stabilising drone", "directed drone", "drone telemeter video"]

Title: MEMORY HAVING INFORMATION NARROWING DETECTION FUNCTION, METHOD FOR USING THE SAME, AND MEMORY AND DEVICE INCLUDING THE MEMORY
Abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To achieve a non-Neumann type information detection memory for making it unnecessary to perform successive comparison processing of a memory because of the fact that the largest problem of information detection such as pattern recognition is a search time.SOLUTION: Disclosed is a memory that has an information narrowing detection function, stores information for each memory address, and reads the information. The memory is characterized by including input means of input data, that is, both first data to be applied from the outside as data for comparing the stored data of the memory and second data as data for comparing the mutual addresses; means for determining doubly in parallel success/failure of the data of information and address stored in the both input data applied from the input means, and for further performing in parallel logical arithmetic operation of the success/failure determination result of the both data; and means for outputting the address of the memory which succeeds in the logical arithmetic operation. Title: Records Management System and Method
Abstract: A records management system and method that permits paper records to be tagged, stored and retrieved according to user criteria. The system includes a scanning module, a central server, one or more user workstations and an optical character recognition server. After scanning, the records may then be serialized and categorized by project, and then supplemented automatically by the system with a hypertext data file. The system provides for the manual input of additional hypertext data and merger of the hypertext data file with other records in the project. The end user may then search and/or filter records according to information contained in the hypertext data file. Because the pages may be sorted according to user criteria, the user may shuffle through pages from various different documents, thus allowing them to quickly retrieve the records they need and perform such actions as trend-spotting.
Keywords: ["recognition server scanning", "records tagged", "automatically hypertext", "data file pages", "records management method"]

Title: Intelligent computer numerical control system for laser cutting machine
Abstract: The utility model relates to a computer numerical control system, especially relates to an intelligent computer numerical control system for a laser cutting machine, and belongs to the field of digital control application. Based on an open type computer numerical control system, the system of the utility model is provided with a cutting state automatic detection unit, a laser cutting expert system and a laser cutting technique database, and has the intelligent characteristics of automatic detection, automatic diagnosis, automatic optimization, automatic learning function or the like. A laser cutting machine equipped with the intelligent computer numerical control system can be utilized for on-line detecting cutting quality, forming an optimum cutting technique scheme according to the cutting quality, and optimizing laser output power, motion speed of each shaft, protection gas pressure and other parameters, thereby guaranteeing fine quality, rapid speed and low energy consumption during the entire cutting process.
Keywords: ["optimizing laser output", "detecting cutting quality", "computer numerical control", "control laser", "model provided cutting"]

Title: Semantics update and adaptive interfaces in connection with information as a service
Abstract: Additional semantic information that describes data sets is inferred in response to a request for data from the data sets, e.g., in response to a query over the data sets, including analyzing a subset of results extracted based on the request for data to determine the additional semantic information. The additional semantic information can be verified by the publisher as correct, or satisfy correctness probabilistically. Mapping information based on the additional semantic information can be maintained and updated as the system learns additional semantic information (e.g., information about what a given column represents and data types represented), and the form of future data requests (e.g., URL based queries) can be updated to more closely correspond to the updated additional semantic information.
Keywords: ["probabilistically mapping information", "determine additional semantic", "data requests", "based request data", "updated additional semantic"]

Title: Implicit and explicit channel sounding for beamforming
Abstract: A communication device for transmitting beamformed signals using implicit channel sounding is described. The communication device includes a processor and instructions stored in memory. The communication device receives one or more sounding signals and computes a channel estimate based on the one or more sounding signals. Frequency offset compensation is applied to the channel estimate by the communication device. The communication device also computes a precoding matrix based on the channel estimate and transmits a beamformed signal using the precoding matrix. Another communication device for receiving beamformed signals using explicit channel sounding is also described. The communication device includes a processor and instructions stored in memory. The communication device receives one or more sounding signals, computes a channel estimate based on the one or more sounding signals and applies amplitude compensation to the channel estimate. The communication device also sends estimated channel data and receives a beamformed signal.
Keywords: ["transmits beamformed signal", "estimated channel data", "beamformed signals using", "amplitude compensation channel", "implicit channel sounding"]

Title: Method for inputting handwritten information into computer by touch-screen mobile phone
Abstract: The invention discloses a method for inputting handwritten information into a computer by a touch-screen mobile phone, which comprises the following steps of: establishing a connection between the mobile phone and the computer by a USB (universal serial bus); entering a writing board mode of the mobile phone, and starting an information input function of the mobile phone; enumerating USB device by the computer, and running a PC (personal computer) input method program on the computer; receiving stroke information input by a user by the mobile phone, and sending a touch-screen coordinate corresponding to the stroke information to the computer; and recording the touch-screen coordinate by the computer, identifying the stroke information input by the user, and displaying the stroke information on a display screen of the computer. In the invention, through taking a mobile phone with a touch screen as a handwritten input tool, the mobile phone concurrently has a handwritten letter symbol input function and a graphic input function, so that the potential of currently continually-increased smart phones is fully explored, thereby providing great convenience for PC users who are weak in Chinese input methods such as a five-stroke input method, a Pinyin input method and the like, and bringing new experiences to users.
Keywords: ["computer input method", "phone computer usb", "input tool mobile", "handwritten information", "phone concurrently handwritten"]

Title: AUTOMATED IDENTIFICATION OF SHOE PARTS

Title: OUTSIDE VIEW RECOGNITION DEVICE FOR VEHICLES
Abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an outside view recognition device for vehicles that estimates the conspicuity of an obstacle with increased accuracy and changes the timing of control for avoidance of obstacles executed by the vehicle such as alarm activation and automatic braking depending on an obstacle that is less likely to be recognized by a driver, an obstacle that is easy to be recognized by the driver, or an obstacle that is highly likely to be recognized by the driver.SOLUTION: An outside view recognition device for vehicles 1000 comprises: an image capturing section 1011 that captures an image of the view around an own vehicle equipped with the device; an obstacle information acquiring section 1021 that acquires information on a position of an obstacle around the own vehicle; an obstacle's conspicuity estimating section 1031; and a vehicle control determining section 1041. The obstacle's conspicuity estimating section 1031 estimates the conspicuity of the obstacle on the basis of luminance components of predetermined areas of the image based on information about colors of the predetermined areas including the obstacle and an area around the obstacle. The vehicle control determining section 1041 determines whether the vehicle is required to output a command to execute control for avoidance of obstacles or not, or the timing of outputting the command, on the basis of the conspicuity of the obstacle estimated.
Keywords: ["view vehicle", "vehicle control determining", "conspicuity obstacle basis", "recognition device vehicles", "estimates conspicuity obstacle"]

Title: Determining physiological training effect of exercise
Abstract: Physiological training effect (TE) of a physiological performance of a person is determined using a portable device that monitors the performance to obtain performance data 21A, 21B (e.g. heart rate, acceleration, position, velocity, power). The device includes computing means to determine a first training effect parameter 23A describing a first physiological effect of the performance using a first determination method 22A, and a second training effect parameter 23B describing a second physiological effect of the performance using a second determination method 22B. A third training effect parameter 26 describing a third physiological effect of the performance using a third determination method may be calculated. The third physiological effect being a combination effect of the first and second physiological effects which are different from each other and are descriptive of different physiological effects of training, such as homeostatic disturbance and cumulative physiological load, respectively. The training effect parameters are displayed and or stored 24A, 24B, 27. The training effect parameters may be peak fitness, cumulative intensity/load, recovery time, peakTE, baseTE and totalTE etc.
Keywords: ["method calculated physiological", "physiological effects different", "27 training effect", "training effect te", "physiological performance person"]

Title: DEAD RECKONING USING PROXIMITY SENSORS
Abstract: Various arrangements for limiting inaccuracy of dead reckoning are presented. Proximity data may be collected using a plurality of proximity sensors of a mobile device. A position of the mobile device may be determined in relation to a user using the proximity data. Whether to determine a location of the mobile device using a dead reckoning technique may be determined at least partially based on the position of the mobile device in relation to the user
Keywords: ["position mobile device", "sensors mobile", "using proximity data", "reckoning presented", "inaccuracy dead reckoning"]

Title: Method of edge match for linear elements
Abstract: The invention discloses a method of edge match for linear elements, which can improve the correction, efficiency and fault tolerance of edge match. According to the invention, a double restriction condition of spatial relation and attribute relation is adopted to avoid mis-matching of a linear object and avoid leaked connection by an edge matching table. The edge matching object is divided into internal and external object sets according to the relationship with the spatial range, times of edge match for each object are pre-constructed and judgment of spatial relation of edge match is converted into judgment of distance between end points of linear objects, so that the method provided by the invention, compared with the prior art, is higher in correction, stronger in fault tolerance, and higher in efficiency of searching for the edge matching objects.

Title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR GENERATING DISCRETE-TIME MODEL (DTM) OF CONTINUOUS-TIME MODEL (CTM) FOR A DYNAMICAL SYSTEM
Abstract: Method and apparatus for processing continuous-time models (CTM) in a digital processing architecture is disclosed. The discrete state-space technique maps the CTM into the discrete-time model (DTM) and stores the states of the system in a sample time independent discrete state space set of matrices. The resulting state-space matrices can be processed in software or directly in hardware. The method disclosed is particularly suited to be used in automatic synthesis algorithms where a digital circuit is generated from an algorithm described in a high level language or model representation such as, for example, data flow or bond graph into a hardware description language (HDL), and the HDL model can be synthesized using system specific tools to generate an application specific integrated circuit (ASIC) or an FPGA configuration.
Keywords: ["automatic synthesis algorithms", "directly hardware method", "model dtm stores", "ctm discrete time", "processing architecture disclosed"]

Title: INFORMATION PROCESSING APPARATUS, CONTROL METHOD, AND COMPUTER READABLE RECORDING MEDIUM HAVING CONTROL PROGRAM
Abstract: PURPOSE: An information processing device, a control method thereof, and a computer readable recording medium thereof are provided to suppress probability of the information processing device to be down by improving memory access performance. A suppression control unit suppresses the access through the node to the interface memory area when the errors are detected. A recovery unit recovers data in a memory area which is different from the interface memory area. A notifying unit notifies other nodes of the information about the memory area different from the interface memory area. A restart control unit restarts the access through the nodes to the data. Title: DRIVE METHOD FOR NON-CONTACT POWER TRANSMISSION DEVICE AND NON-CONTACT POWER TRANSMISSION DEVICE
Abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a drive method for non-contact power transmission device and a non-contact power transmission device capable of simplifying the structure and increasing power supply efficiency and detection accuracy of metal and electrical apparatuses as well as miniaturization of the device.SOLUTION: Energization of a primary coil disposed in a feeding area AR is driven to be switchable according to a first resonance frequency near a frequency at which a primary coil disposed in a feeding area AR is determined by the primary coil and a primary capacitor and a second resonance frequency near a frequency at which the primary coil is determined by a secondary inductor component and a secondary capacitor capacity component under a state in which a secondary coil L2 opposes thereto.

Title: Robot device, terminal device, remote control system for robot device and program
Abstract: The present invention is a robot device (1) capable of receiving information from a terminal device, which is provided with: a communication unit which receives, from a terminal device (101), positional information generated on the basis of a map of a work area, for a robot device (1), that has been created at the terminal device (101), and control instructions for the robot (1); a run unit which moves the robot device (1); and a control unit which drives the run unit on the basis of the positional information in order to execute work on the basis of the control instructions.

Title: Method and system for simplified knowledge engineering
Abstract: A system and a method are disclosed for knowledge engineering using a computerized graphical editor to manage and create knowledge-based systems containing a navigable graph of modal pages with conditional content and user interface knowledge. The invention enables the entire knowledge engineering workflow to be performed within a non-technical graphical environment and without requiring a computer programming or mathematical background. Further, the presentation of knowledge as modal pages allows for simple ontological discovery and end-user player operation. Once editing is complete, the method allows for the set of pages, variables, and settings of which the knowledge-based system is composed to be exported into an independently executable knowledge -based system player containing an embedded inference engine.
Keywords: ["simple ontological discovery", "executable knowledge", "knowledge based player", "knowledge engineering workflow", "knowledge modal pages"]

Title: Airplane three-dimensional attitude computation method
Abstract: The invention provides an airplane three-dimensional attitude computation method. Firstly, preprocessing is carried out on an image to be processed by the adoption of Gaussian smooth filtering to eliminate influences of noise on follow-up algorithms; secondly, the smoothened image is segmented by the adoption of a fuzzy C-means clustering algorithm (FCM) to obtain a binary image, then Hough conversion is carried out on the binary image obtained through segmentation, a part, with obvious linear features, on a target is detected, feature points of the part, with non-obvious linear features, on the target are extracted by the adoption of a framework, and then linear fitting is carried out on the feature points on the framework to obtain a target axis; finally, the obtained axis, the actual size of the target, camera parameters and other information are combined, and a three-dimensional attitude parameter of the target under a camera coordinate system is calculated by means of projective geometry knowledge. On the basis of geometrical features capable of reflecting the structure of an object and by means of Hough conversion and framework extraction of the whole target image, the obtained axis is more accurate, and the obtained three-dimensional attitude parameter is more precise.
Keywords: ["geometrical features", "attitude parameter target", "camera coordinate calculated", "provides airplane dimensional", "image hough conversion"]

Title: Multifunctional child talkback early education machine
Abstract: The invention relates to a multifunctional child talkback early education machine which comprises a voice recognition module, a face recognition module, a controller module, a display module and a voice play module. The controller module is connected with the voice recognition module, the face recognition module, the display module and the voice play module so as to start different user modes corresponding to different users according to the users recognized by the voice recognition module or the face recognition module. Video content and audio content played by the display module and the voice play module respectively under the different user modes are different. By means of the early education machine, the users currently using the early education machine can be recognized so that the different user modes can be started, and the audio and video content of various styles can be played.
Keywords: ["recognition module controller", "recognized voice recognition", "education machine", "child talkback early", "display module voice"]

Title: Method and system for recommending video resource
Abstract: The invention discloses a method and a system for recommending a video resource. The method comprises that: historical records of all users in the process of watching videos are collected; statistics is performed on the collected historical records of all the users, the number ratio of various types of videos watched by all the users is calculated according to the number of various types of videos watched by all the users, and user groups which include typical users and are corresponding to specific video types are generated; data characteristics of typical users in all the specific types of user groups on other dimensions are acquired respectively, and group characteristics of all the specific types of users on other dimensions are confirmed; whether the data characteristics of other users apart from the typical users on other dimensions meet the group characteristics of certain specific types of groups is judged, and if judgment result is yes, the users are added into the specific types of user groups; and according to the corresponding specific types of information of all the user groups, the corresponding video resource is recommended to the users in the user groups. With application of the method and the system for recommending the video resource, content recommendation can be specifically performed when the users are watching videos so that recommendation effect is enhanced.
Keywords: ["resource content recommendation", "groups corresponding video", "process watching videos", "method recommending", "videos watched users"]

Title: OPTIMIZATION OF SOCIAL MEDIA ENGAGEMENT
Abstract: Methods for optimizing social media are disclosed. Such methods may include identifying at least one keyword utilized for at least one webpage, identifying social media correspondence referencing the at least one keyword, analyzing content collected from the social media to determine a frequency of references to the at least one keyword and generating at least one report including information based on the analysis. The report may include recommendations for optimizing social media by, for example, purchasing paid posts or links on a social media website. Systems for performing the methods are also disclosed.
Keywords: ["keyword utilized webpage", "social media correspondence", "optimizing", "methods optimizing", "social media disclosed"]

Title: Sentiment Analysis of Data Logs
Abstract: An approach is provided to use natural language processing (NLP) to analyze data logs. In the approach, a data log is analyzed with the data log including a number of entries. The analysis performed includes performance of a sentiment analysis of the entries using natural language processing. The result of the sentiment analysis results is a sentiment score. Entries from the data log are then visually highlighted based on their corresponding sentiment scores.
Keywords: ["sentiment analysis entries", "use natural language", "data logs approach", "data log analyzed", "nlp"]

Title: TRAINING SYSTEM AND TRAINING METHOD
Abstract: A training system is equipped with a first detection unit that detects a motion of a mobile body that moves within a predetermined region, and a command unit that issues a motion command for the mobile body based on the motion of the mobile body. A user operates the mobile body in accordance with the motion command of the command unit. An accessible region and an inaccessible region are set in the predetermined region. Besides, the training system is equipped with a second detection unit that detects a distance between the mobile body and the inaccessible region, and a warning unit that issues a warning when the distance detected by the second detection unit is equal to or shorter than a first predetermined value.
Keywords: ["unit detects distance", "training equipped second", "detects motion mobile", "region training", "second detection"]

Title: MEDICAL IMAGE PROCESSING APPARATUS AND MAGNETIC RESONANCE IMAGING APPARATUS
Abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To accurately reduce image distortion included in a diffusion-weighted image (DWI image).SOLUTION: A storage part 20 stores DWI images collected by an EPI technique with application of MPG pulses. An image processing part 97 generates corrected DWI images reduced in image distortion due to the EPI technique without application of MPG pulses and image distortion due to application of the MPG pulses, from the DWI image, by using a first distortion map showing space distribution of the distortion by the EPI technique without application of the MPG pulses and a second distortion map showing space distribution of the distortion due to the application of the MPG pulses.
Keywords: ["distortion epi technique", "image dwi", "distortion application mpg", "diffusion weighted image", "accurately reduce image"]

Title: Device and method for detecting a wheel axle of a vehicle
Abstract: Die vorliegenden Erfindung betrifft eine Vorrichtung (3) und ein Verfahren zur Detektion einer Radachse (4) eines auf einer Fahrbahn (1) fahrenden Fahrzeugs (2), umfassend:eine Mehrzahl von Radarsensoren (Rn), welche jeweils mittels eines etwa senkrecht nach unten gerichteten Messstrahls (Bn) ihres Sendeempfängers (Tn) zu aufeinanderfolgenden Zeitpunkten jeweils einen Doppler-Geschwindigkeitsmesswert (vn) für ein den Messstrahl (Bn) reflektierendes Objekt (1, 2, 6) erzeugen, undeine an Messwertausgänge der Radarsensoren (Rn) angeschlossene Auswerteeinheit (A), welche dafür ausgebildet ist, eine Radachse (4) zu detektieren, wenn zwei Radarsensoren (Rn, Rn-x) innerhalb eines Toleranzzeitfensters (W) im Wesentlichen gleich große Maxima (vn,p, vn-x,p) oder Minima ihrer Geschwindigkeitsmesswerte (vn, vn-x) erzeugen.

Title: Method for Processing Transactional Data, Corresponding Terminal, Server and Computer Program
Abstract: A system is provided for processing data for surveillance bank cards. The system includes a module for introducing data for surveillance bank cards into a platform for payment by bank card, the module saving bank-card data, inserted into the platform for payment by bank card, to a data base known as a tracking data base. The system also includes a surveillance module for placing under surveillance the activity of the data for surveillance bank cards previously introduced into the platform for payment by bank card, the module saving, to the tracking data base, at least one record of tracking of the use of the bank-card data.
Keywords: ["bank cards platform", "includes surveillance", "surveillance module placing", "bank card module", "tracking data base"]

Title: SIZE MEASUREMENT METHOD, CAMERA-EQUIPPED ELECTRONIC DEVICE, PROGRAM FOR CAMERA-EQUIPPED ELECTRONIC DEVICE, AND MARKER FOR SIZE MEASUREMENT
Abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To enable an easy measurement of a correct size of an actual subject using a camera-equipped electronic device.SOLUTION: A marker 10 is used that consists of a long strip where a plurality of rectangles with their lengths identified are arrayed. With a captured image P1 displayed in a display 3, an electronic device 2 performs image recognition processing to identify a rectangle in a marker image 10A corresponding to a range of a subject image 1A in a size measurement direction. Then, an actual size of a subject 1 is calculated on a basis of a size of the subject image 1A, an image size of all the identified rectangles, and a sum of lengths of the rectangles, and the size is displayed on the display 3.
Keywords: ["device performs image", "lengths rectangles size", "size subject calculated", "identify rectangle marker", "performs image recognition"]

Title: PIXEL INTERPOLATION APPARATUS, IMAGE CAPTURE APPARATUS, STORAGE MEDIUM, AND INTEGRATED CIRCUIT
Abstract: An image capture apparatus 1000 includes an image capture unit C1, a signal processor unit C2, and a pixel interpolation unit 100. In the image capture apparatus 1000, with respect to an image signal captured by the image capture unit C1 which includes a single image sensor having three-color filters in arbitrary colors, a plurality of pairs of correlation degrees of two directions which are perpendicular to each other are obtained using image data of pixels provided around an observed pixel, and a pixel interpolation process is carried out using the correlation degrees as a reference for determination. Then, in the image capture apparatus 1000, even if a color component pixel in the same color as a color component pixel on which the pixel interpolation process is to be carried out is not provided in a direction where there is strong correlation, a rate of change in a direction perpendicular to the direction where there is strong correlation is obtained using a pixel value which is obtained though color space conversion in the direction perpendicular to the direction where there is strong correlation. Thus, a pixel interpolation process is carried out based on the obtained rate of change.
Keywords: ["pixels", "captured image capture", "strong correlation pixel", "image capture unit", "pixel interpolation process"]

Title: FALLBACK DETECTION IN MOTION ESTIMATION
Abstract: Techniques related to managing the use of motion estimation in video processing are discussed. Such techniques may include determining dividing two video frames each into corresponding regions, generating phase plane correlations for the corresponding regions, determining whether the video frames are motion estimation correlated based on the phase plane correlations, and providing a video frame prediction mode indicator based on the determination.
Keywords: ["correlations providing video", "dividing video frames", "motion estimation correlated", "regions determining video", "use motion estimation"]

Title: Cloud adaptive processing method and device, terminal, and cloud server
Abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a cloud adaptive processing method and device, a terminal, and a cloud server. The method can comprise the steps that the terminal sends an adaption request to the cloud server, wherein the adaption request comprises the attribute of a target adaption point and target type features, so as to enable the cloud server to obtain the target adaption data through matching according to the attribute of the target adaption point and the target type features and to return the target adaption data to the terminal; the terminal employs the target adaption data to generate a target adaption model; the terminal operates the target adaption model so as to carry out the adaptive processing of the terminal when the business corresponding to the target adaption point is detected. The method can download the adaption data from cloud for the adaptive processing of the terminal, improves the intelligentization of adaptive processing, improves the universality of adaptive processing, and improves the flexibility of adaptive processing.
Keywords: ["cloud server obtain", "adaptive processing method", "adaptive processing terminal", "device terminal cloud", "adaption request cloud"]

Title: LEVERAGING A HYBRID INFRASTRUCTURE FOR DYNAMIC MEMORY ALLOCATION AND PERSISTENT FILE STORAGE
Abstract: Dynamic allocation of memory in a hybrid system is provided. In particularly, a method and system is provided to leverage a hybrid infrastructure for dynamic memory allocation and persistent file storage. The method includes a method comprises dynamically allocating a file or its part or to cache a file or its part between different storage technologies and respective memory technologies in a hybrid infrastructure.
Keywords: ["hybrid infrastructure dynamic", "dynamically allocating file", "file storage method", "memory technologies hybrid", "memory allocation persistent"]

Title: MEMRISTOR APPARATUS
Abstract: A memristor apparatus includes meta-stable switching elements and an AHAH (Anti-Hebbian and Hebbian) feedback mechanism that operates the meta-stable switching elements.

Title: DATA-DEPENDENT CLUSTERING OF GEOSPATIAL WORDS
Abstract: Embodiments include method, systems and computer program products for data-dependent clustering of geospatial words. In some embodiments, a matrix of words and locations may be obtained. A plurality of locality-sensitive hash (LSH) functions may be generated. A plurality of sparse row vectors may be generated. A plurality of sparse LSH functions may be generated based on the plurality of LSH functions. A clustering bucket may be determined from a plurality of clustering buckets for each of the plurality of sparse row vectors using the sparse LSH functions.
Keywords: ["clustering bucket", "obtained plurality locality", "matrix words locations", "lsh functions clustering", "geospatial words embodiments"]

Title: Temperature control method and temperature control device
Abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of temperature control, and particularly relates to a temperature control method and a temperature control device. The temperature control method comprises the steps of monitoring a temperature value of an intelligent terminal in a timed mode; and controlling main frequency of a central processing unit (CPU) in the intelligent terminal according to the monitored temperature value of the intelligent terminal. According to the method provided by the invention, the temperature value of the intelligent terminal is monitored in the timed mode, and the main frequency of the CPU in the intelligent terminal is controlled according to the monitored temperature value of the intelligent terminal, thereby avoiding problems that the power consumption of the intelligent terminal is too high, heat generation of the intelligent terminal is serious, the temperature of the intelligent terminal rises quickly under a circumstance that heat dissipation conditions are limited, a chip is wasted and the like because the main frequency of the CPU is high, and improving the user experience.
Keywords: ["monitoring temperature value", "field temperature control", "intelligent terminal temperature", "control method temperature", "temperature control particularly"]

Title: Image data processing method and device
Abstract: The invention provides an image data processing method and an image data processing device. The image data processing method can comprise the steps of: acquiring a predominance probability value of a pixel point in an image to be processed; determining a face region of the image to be processed; calculating a probability adjustment factor of the pixel point in a designated region based on the distance between the pixel point in the designated region of the image to be processed and a central pixel point of the face region; and adjusting the predominance probability value of the pixel point in the designated region according to the probability adjustment factor. By adopting the image data processing method and the image data processing device, accuracy of detection and extraction of a main body region in a commodity image can be improved.
Keywords: ["device image data", "pixel point image", "face region image", "image processed calculating", "data processing method"]

Title: IMAGE EVALUATING DEVICE, IMAGE EVALUATING METHOD, AND PROGRAM
Abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an image evaluating device, an image evaluating method, and a program capable of quickly determining with high accuracy whether or not an image having a non-permitted stripe defect is printed on printed matter.SOLUTION: Based on a differential value between sample image information stored in a sample image information DB 13 and an inspection target image information read by a reading unit 18, a stripe-like defect is extracted from an inspection target image. Then, visibility of the stripe-like defect extracted by an extraction unit 20 is evaluated by an evaluation unit 22.
Keywords: ["sample image information", "defect printed printed", "stripe defect", "extracted inspection target", "evaluating device image"]

Title: SEGMENTED MRI CATHETERS AND OTHER INTERVENTIONAL DEVICES
Abstract: Disclosed herein are segmented MRI-compatible interventional devices, such as catheters and guidewires, that provide desired mechanical properties while avoiding undesired interactions with MRI fields. Disclosed devices can include helical wires with insulated breaks at intervals along each wire so that the insulated wire segments are individually short enough to avoid substantial resonance and heat being generated in the wires due to an applied MRI field. The segmented wires can be organized into a braided/woven tubular configuration or a non-braided intercalated/parallel tubular configuration that provides the desired mechanical properties similar to conventional metallic braided catheters. The helical wire segments can be insulated such that the wires do not touch each other at points where they cross over each other. Breaks in the wires can be staggered along the longitudinal axis of the device and/or circumferentially around the device to minimize formation of weak areas where wire breaks are aligned or grouped.
Keywords: ["devices catheters", "wire segments insulated", "disclosed segmented mri", "wires organized braided", "mri compatible interventional"]

Title: Method and device for optimizing spectral properties
Abstract: The invention discloses a method and a device for optimizing spectral properties. The method comprises steps as follows: acquiring a first chromatic value and a second chromatic value corresponding preset color temperatures; calculating extrema of a nonlinear function LER, an S/P value and a C/P value under the condition of chromaticity coordinate constraint, and respectively obtaining a maximum extremum, a minimum extremum and corresponding spectra when the maximum extremum and the minimum extremum are reached; obtaining the spectrum peak wavelength range under the limit of the color temperatures; selecting one or two proper spectrum peak wavelengths and half widths for a light source synthesizing the specific color temperature, and determining light source chromaticity on a chromaticity diagram; selecting the dominant wavelength of the chromaticity corresponding to a to-be-added spectrum, and determining the peak wavelength range of the to-be-added spectrum; calculating the LER, the S/P value and the C/P value, and obtaining the spectrum optimized light source. With the adoption of the method, design of the light sources can be optimized and guided, and the properties of the radioluminescence efficiency LER (corresponding parameter LER), the corresponding S/P value of the mesopic vision effect, the corresponding C/P value of the non-visual biological effect and the like of the light source are improved.
Keywords: ["color temperatures calculating", "obtaining spectrum optimized", "device optimizing spectral", "limit color temperatures", "light source chromaticity"]

Title: ELECTRONIC DEVICE AND METHOD FOR PROVIDING INFORMATION IN THE ELECTRONIC DEVICE
Abstract: Embodiments of the present invention relate to an electronic device and an information providing method in an electronic device. The electronic device comprises a display and a processor. The processor responds to a first input and controls an application guiding screen, comprising at least one application execution object corresponding to at least one application, to be displayed on at least a part of the display. When a second input, for an application execution object in which an alarm event occurs among the at least one application execution object, is received, the processor displays information relating on the alarm event through a preview screen. When a third input, for a selection of the alarm event-related information in the preview screen is received, the processor can execute an application corresponding to the application execution object in which the alarm event occurs. According to the present invention, a user does not need to execute an application for checking updating information when an update occurs, thereby checking information from the application in a more convenient and rapider method.
Keywords: ["alarm event related", "corresponding application execution", "information application convenient", "invention relate electronic", "electronic device comprises"]

Title: LANGUAGE MODEL SPEECH ENDPOINTING
Abstract: An automatic speech recognition (ASR) system detects an endpoint of an utterance using the active hypotheses under consideration by a decoder. The ASR system calculates the amount of non-speech detected by a plurality of hypotheses and weights the non-speech duration by the probability of each hypotheses. When the aggregate weighted non-speech exceeds a threshold, an endpoint may be declared.
Keywords: ["speech duration probability", "weighted non speech", "asr calculates", "endpoint utterance", "asr detects"]

Title: System and method for determining lane allocation, and computer readable storage medium
Abstract: The present disclosure provides a system and method for determining a lane allocation of an autonomous vehicle along a road segment and a computer readable storage medium. The system includes: at least one processor programmed to: receive, from a camera, at least one image representing an environment of the vehicle; analyze the at least one image to identify at least one identified landmark; receive a known location of the at least one identified landmark from a database; determine a lateral offset distance between the vehicle and the at least one identified landmark based on a known position of the identified landmark; and determine a current lane allocation of the vehicle along the road segment based on the lateral offset distance between the vehicle and the at least one identified landmark and based on a lateral distance of the identified landmark to a target trajectory associated with the road segment.
Keywords: ["trajectory associated road", "vehicle identified landmark", "determine current lane", "allocation autonomous", "road segment computer"]

Title: Internet and intelligent public bicycle traffic management system and reservation scheduling method
Abstract: Construction of a bicycle intelligent control module, and an electronic control lock, a user intelligent terminal app and a server which are matched with the intelligent control module are involved in an internet and intelligent public bicycle traffic management system and a reservation scheduling method. The intelligent control module is arranged in a bicycle body, the electronic control lock is additionally arranged on the bicycle, the server can still obtain information of the bicycle instantly for replacement of the electronic control lock if the electronic control lock fails, and the bicycle can not rely on easily-damaged locks too much. By means of the server, establishment of a basic database of user data, bicycle data and user reservation bicycle utilization data and two-way data management of real-time data monitoring and history data analysis can be achieved, and support of data can provide the decision making basis for scheduling and management of whole public traffic. The traditional estimation mode is overturned through scheduling and management of the bicycle, and optimization iteration is conducted in an automatic and intelligent mode according to user requirements.
Keywords: ["arranged bicycle server", "reservation bicycle utilization", "bicycle intelligent control", "bicycle traffic management", "user data bicycle"]

Title: BATCH PROCESSING IN A NEURAL NETWORK PROCESSOR
Abstract: Methods, systems, and apparatus, including computer programs encoded on computer storage media, for generating a respective neural network output for each of a plurality of inputs, the method comprising, for each of the neural network layers: receiving a plurality of inputs to be processed at the neural network layer; forming one or more batches of inputs from the plurality of inputs, each batch having a number of inputs up to the respective batch size for the neural network layer; selecting a number of the one or more batches of inputs to process, where a count of the inputs in the number of the one or more batches is greater than or equal to the respective associated batch size of a subsequent layer in the sequence; and processing the number of the one or more batches of inputs to generate the respective neural network layer output.
Keywords: ["layer sequence processing", "plurality inputs batch", "batches inputs generate", "method comprising neural", "neural network output"]

Title: Image steganalysis method and system based on frequency domain analysis
Abstract: The invention discloses an image steganalysis method and system based on frequency domain analysis, and the method comprises the steps: carrying out the frequency domain decomposition of a filter group employed by a spatial domain steganalysis model, obtaining a comprehensive frequency domain obtained through the addition of coefficients of all frequency bands of all filters in the filter group, and generating a spectrogram according to a combined frequency domain; obtaining the energy values corresponding to different frequency bands according to the spectrogram, and generating a distortion function at different frequency bands with different weight values according to the difference of energy values; embedding secret information into an original image according to the distortion function, and obtaining hidden carrier information. The method can protect the secret information embedded into the image from being detected by a steganalysis detection algorithm, improves the steganalysis safety of the image, and facilitates the improvement of the communication safety.
Keywords: ["improves steganalysis safety", "steganalysis model obtaining", "discloses image steganalysis", "steganalysis detection algorithm", "spatial domain steganalysis"]

Title: Alimentary canal lesion image identification system and identification method
Abstract: The invention discloses an alimentary canal lesion image identification system. The system comprises a memory, an image preprocessing module, an image feature extraction module, a machine learning module and an image identification module, wherein the storage data communication end of the memory is connected with the data input end of the image preprocessing module, the data output end of the image preprocessing module is connected with the data input end of the image feature extraction module, the first data output end of the image feature extraction module is connected with the data input end of the machine learning module, the second data output end of the image feature extraction module is connected with the first data input end of the image identification module, and the data output end of the machine learning module is connected with the second data input end of the image identification module. The efficiency and the accuracy of alimentary canal lesion image identification are improved.
Keywords: ["canal lesion", "comprises memory image", "identification module data", "image feature extraction", "discloses alimentary canal"]

Title: Robot body structure

Much more more this body drying constructs the degree of freedom that has, can control swing back and forth, has better adaptive capacity to environment, and simple structure, dependable performance are worth popularization in the field of business.

Title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MONITORING THE INGESTION OF FOOD AND/OR DRINK BY A SUBJECT
Abstract: There is provided an apparatus for monitoring the ingestion of food and/or drink by a subject, the apparatus comprising a control unit that comprises a first obtaining module configured to obtain measurements of one or more physiological characteristics of the subject; a second obtaining module configured to obtain measurements of eddy currents generated in the body of the subject by an externally-applied magnetic field; a setting module configured to set a respective cut-off frequency for one or more filtering stages based on a respective frequency for each of said one or more physiological characteristics; a filtering module configured to filter the measurements of eddy currents using the one or more filtering stages to remove signal components due to the one or more physiological characteristics; and a processing module configured to process the filtered measurements to determine whether food and/or drink is present in the stomach of the subject.
Keywords: ["provided apparatus", "process filtered measurements", "food drink subject", "physiological characteristics processing", "determine food"]

Title: CONVOLUTIONAL NEURAL NETWORK COMPUTING APPARATUS
Abstract: The present invention relates to a digital neural network computing technology field. More specifically, the present invention relates to a convolution neural network computing apparatus including a distributed memory structure for storing artificial neural network data and a computational structure for time-divisionally processing all neurons in a pipeline circuit. The convolution neural network computing apparatus operates as a synchronized circuit in which all elements are synchronized to one system clock. According to an embodiment of the present invention, a convolution neural network computing apparatus has a plurality of convolutional layers including a plurality of input units and a plurality of output units. The convolution neural network computing apparatus includes: a layer division unit for dividing each of the convolution layers into a plurality of partial layers; a calculation unit for performing convolution calculation in preset order of the partial layers; a memory unit for storing input data and output data calculated from the calculating unit; and a receptor unit for transforming data input from the memory unit into a reception field including data in n x n size, wherein n is a predetermined integer, and for providing the data to the calculation unit.
Keywords: ["storing artificial neural", "neurons pipeline circuit", "convolution layers", "invention relates convolution", "network computing apparatus"]

Title: Full life cycle based power grid planning management method
Abstract: The invention relates to a full life cycle based power grid planning management method, and belongs to the technical field of power grid planning. The full life cycle based power grid planning management method comprises the steps that firstly various implementation schemes of a power grid planning project are determined; full-life-cycle stage division is performed on the various implementation schemes of the power grid planning project; life cycle cost (LCC) calculation is respectively performed on each divided life cycle stage of the various implementation schemes, and the discounted power grid planning full LCC of the various implementation schemes is acquired; and a full-life-cycle net annual value (NAV) of the various implementation schemes is calculated according to the discounted power grid planning full LCC, and a preferred scheme is determined through comparing the full-life-cycle net annual values (NAVs) of the various implementation schemes. According to the invention, cost optimization and saving of a power grid construction project can be realized, the resource consumption can be lowered, and the project construction cost can be reduced.
Keywords: ["cycle based power", "cost lcc calculation", "schemes power grid", "life cycle cost", "grid planning management"]

Title: Control method and system for intelligent nursing robot
Abstract: The invention provides a control method and system for an intelligent nursing robot. According to the control method, after communication connection between the intelligent nursing robot and terminal equipment is built, the intelligent nursing robot receives an intelligent nursing robot starting instruction which is sent by the terminal equipment and input by a user, the intelligent nursing robot determines the current work mode, and work modes include a study teaching work mode, a nursing work mode, a cleaning work mode, a reminding work mode, an electricity detection work mode, an environment detection work mode, an eating-assisting work mode, an information processing work mode, an interconnection and interaction work mode and an equipment starting work mode. The intelligent nursing robot integrates the above functions, thereby being high in integration degree. In this way, the intelligent nursing robot not only has the above functions, but also is lower in cost.
Keywords: ["robot integrates", "receives intelligent nursing", "robot according control", "robot functions", "method intelligent nursing"]

Title: DETECTION OF HANDS AND FEET BY HIERARCHICAL CONTEXT-AWARE
Abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To detect hands and feet of a user related to a mobile platform precisely.SOLUTION: A method carried out by a computer includes: an image acquisition step acquiring an image from a sensor which a mobile platform has; a detection step detecting one or more object corresponding to hands and feet of a user related to the mobile platform from the image; a determination step determining reliability for each of the one or more object by using more than two context processors together; and a filter step filtering the object on the basis of the reliability.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

Title: Pattern recognition method and device
Abstract: The invention discloses a pattern recognition method and device. The pattern recognition method includes the steps of carrying out feature extraction on input training data; after clustering analysisis conducted through an adaptive kernel possibility fuzzy C-means clustering algorithm, creating a reference model and saving the reference model into a reference model database; conducting same feature extraction on input testing data to obtain a testing feature vector, and executing pattern matching on the testing feature vector and each reference model in the reference model database to obtaina pattern recognition result. The pattern recognition device includes a training unit and a recognition unit. According to the scheme of the embodiment, the reference model is created after the clustering analysis is carried out through the adaptive kernel possibility fuzzy C-means clustering algorithm (AKPFCM), adaptive adjustment of the parameter of a kernel function can be achieved according tothe distribution condition of the feature data, better clustering of the feature data is achieved, and the clustering performance is effectively improved.
Keywords: ["device pattern recognition", "recognition method includes", "clustering feature data", "fuzzy means clustering", "clustering algorithm akpfcm"]

Title: IMAGE-PROCESSING APPARATUS, BIOLOGICAL OBSERVATION APPARATUS, AND IMAGE-PROCESSING METHOD
Abstract: Provided is an image-processing portion including: a fat-region setting portion that detects fat-region information that indicates a fat region in which fat exists in a biological-tissue image; a blood-region-information detecting portion that detects blood-region information that indicates a blood region in which blood exists in the biological-tissue image; a confidence-calculating portion that calculates a confidence for the fat-region information on a basis of the fat-region-information detected by the fat-region setting portion and the blood-region-information detected by the blood-region-information detecting portion; and a display-form setting portion that manipulates the fat region indicated by the fat-region information for which the calculated confidence calculated by the fat-region confidence-calculating portion is lower than a reference confidence that serves as a reference so as to have a display form that can be distinguished from a peripheral region.
Keywords: ["information detected fat", "calculates confidence fat", "fat region setting", "tissue image confidence", "including fat region"]

Title: Concrete pouring quality CT detector system and detecting method
Abstract: The invention provides a concrete pouring quality CT detector system and a detecting method. The system is of a distributive integrated structure and is a CT detector which is provided with an embedded system and is on the basis of wireless data transmission.
