The system comprises a main control station, a plurality of acquiring substations and a compacting source triggering substation, wherein each acquiring substation is connected to the main control station in a wireless network communication manner; the compacting source triggering substation is connected to the main control station in thewireless network communication manner; each acquiring substation is connected to the compacting source triggering substation in the wireless network communication manner. The system has the advantagesthat a lightweight, small-size, variable channel umber and variable function type concrete pouring quality CT detector which is free from a cable and a host power supply is provided and is on the basis of the embedding technology and the wireless transmission technology and can be widely popularized and used.
Keywords: ["substations compacting source", "transmission technology", "ct detector free", "detector detecting method", "concrete pouring quality"]

Title: Image retrieval method and apparatus, computer device, and storage medium
Abstract: The invention provides an image retrieval method and apparatus, a computer device and a storage medium, the method comprising: acquiring a retrieved image; inputting the retrieved image into a convolution neural network trained in advance for the training image samples with similar relationship, and obtaining the first output result through an input layer and a pre-convolution layer. The first output result is inputted to the branch network, and the position probability map of the object corresponding to the probability that each pixel point is an object is obtained. The first output result isinput to the middle convolution layer of the convolution neural network to obtain the feature map of the retrieved image; the feature map of fused position information is obtained by point multiplication of feature map and position probability map, and the feature map of fused position information is input to the post-convolutional layer of the convolution neural network, and the feature vector of retrieved image is outputted through the post-convolutional layer and full connection layer. The feature vector of the retrieved image is compared with the feature vector of each image in the database, and the retrieval result of the retrieved image is obtained. This method has high accuracy.
Keywords: ["result retrieved image", "image convolution neural", "vector image database", "image obtained method", "provides image retrieval"]

Title: User portrait constructing method and device as well as recommending method and device
Abstract: The invention provides a user portrait constructing method and device as well as a recommending method and device. The user portrait constructing method comprises the following steps: acquiring a user's characteristic data, and determining the type of the characteristic data; constructing a data portrait according to the characteristic data and the type of the characteristic data; and constructing a user portrait according to the data portrait. The technical scheme of the invention realizes that the user owned personalized information is described by using sentence vectors and article vectors, the insufficiency in portraying the user by text labels is compensated, and implicated information at the semantic level can be expressed, so the portrait has semantic information, and the user is more comprehensively and accurately portrayed.
Keywords: ["portraying user text", "data portrait technical", "expressed portrait semantic", "portrait constructing method", "device user portrait"]

Title: FILTERING STRENGTH DETERMINATION METHOD, MOVING PICTURE CODING METHOD AND MOVING PICTURE DECODING METHOD
Abstract: A moving picture coding apparatus includes an inter-pixel filter having filters for filtering decoded image data so as to remove block distortion which is high frequency noise around block boundaries. The inter-pixel filter includes filters having different filtering strengths. The coding apparatus also includes a filter processing control unit for determining a filtering strength of the inter-pixel filter.
Keywords: ["filter processing", "includes inter pixel", "strengths coding apparatus", "filters filtering decoded", "moving picture"]

Title: Multi-threshold multi-function neuron design method
Abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of multi-threshold multi-function neuron design methods and belongs to the technical field of artificial intelligence, bionics and circuit design. An artificial neuron receives multiple inputs. When an accumulated value is lower than a minimum threshold, the artificial neuron cannot be activated. When the accumulated value exceeds a set threshold, the artificial neuron is activated. The artificial neuron is provided with multiple thresholds. When the accumulated value reaches a certain threshold, the activation function corresponding to the certain threshold is started and the value of the corresponding intensity is output to a next neuron.
Keywords: ["provided multiple thresholds", "activated artificial neuron", "function neuron", "neuron design methods", "multi threshold multi"]

Title: SPEAKER RECOGNITION IN THE CALL CENTER
Abstract: Utterances of at least two speakers in a speech signal may be distinguished and the associated speaker identified by use of diarization together with automatic speech recognition of identifying words and phrases commonly in the speech signal. The diarization process clusters turns of the conversation while recognized special form phrases and entity names identify the speakers. A trained probabilistic model deduces which entity name(s) correspond to the clusters.
Keywords: ["speakers speech signal", "distinguished associated speaker", "diarization process clusters", "recognition identifying words", "speakers trained probabilistic"]

Title: COMPUTATIONALLY DERIVED ASSESSMENT IN CHILDHOOD EDUCATION SYSTEMS
Abstract: A system for performing implicit assessment of a pupil is provided. The system receives a learning content from a content provider, the learning content having checkpoints at different stages of the learning content. The system associates assessment instructions with each checkpoint of the learning content. The system renders the received learning content for presentation to a pupil and captures the behaviors of the pupil during the presentation of the learning content. The system performs an assessment of the pupil at each checkpoint encountered during the rendering of the learning presentation. The assessment at a checkpoint includes using the checkpoint's associated assessment instructions to assign a score based on the captured behaviors. The system then produces an overall evaluationbased on the assessments performed at the encountered checkpoints.
Keywords: ["checkpoint associated assessment", "behaviors pupil presentation", "content performs assessment", "checkpoint learning content", "implicit assessment"]

Title: Anpassbare Verarbeitungskomponenten
Abstract: Bei der Konfiguration eines Verarbeitungssystems mit einer Anwendung, die aus Machine Learning-Komponenten besteht, wobei die Anwendung an einem Satz von Trainingsdaten trainiert wurde, wird die Anwendung auf dem Verarbeitungssystem unter Verwendung eines weiteren Satzes von Trainingsdaten ausgeführt. Aus dem weiteren Satz von Trainingsdaten erzeugte Ausgaben der Anwendung, die mit Ground-Truth-Daten übereinstimmen, werden identifiziert. Die Komponenten werden angepasst, um Ausgaben der Anwendung, die mit den Ground-Truth-Daten übereinstimmen, unter Verwendung der identifizierten Ausgaben der Anwendung zu erzeugen.
Keywords: ["trainingsdaten", "von trainingsdaten trainiert", "eines verarbeitungssystems", "aus machine learning", "truth daten \u00fcbereinstimmen"]

Title: УСТРОЙСТВО ДЛЯ ПСИХОФИЗИОЛОГИЧЕСКОГО ТЕСТИРОВАНИЯ ПЕРЕГОВОРЩИКОВ
Abstract: Полезная модель относится к области психофизиологии труда специалистов опасных профессий и может применяться для профессионального отбора переговорщиков.Устройство для тестирования психофизиологического состояния переговорщиков состоит из металлической крестообразной рамы, образованной двумя жестко закрепленными перпендикулярно расположенными полыми перекладинами с полыми вертикальными стойками, расположенными на их концах, причем в точке пересечения перекладин установлено полое оборудованное гониометром шарнирное крепление для кресла со спинкой, на вертикальной стойке перед креслом расположено табло для предъявления информации, лампа-вспышка и биорадиолокатор, на остальных стойках расположены акустические динамики, одна из боковых стоек оборудована USB-портом для подключения накопителя с энергонезависимой памятью, модуля коммутации, модуля электропитания и микрокомпьютера, с которым кабелями, размещенными в полостях перекладин и стоек, соединяются внешние устройства, отличающееся тем, что в боковую стойку вмонтирован двухрежимный индикатор исправности устройства, соединенный кабелями с модулем электропитания и микрокомпьютером, причем экран табло выполнен с возможностью предъявления на нем видеоинформации для психофизиологического тестирования переговорщиков, сопровождаемой аудиокомментариями через акустические динамики, предъявлении переговорщикам вопросов психологических тестов, где их ответ обрабатывается блоком речевого ввода информации и передается в микрокомпьютер, при этом подключаемые биорадиолокатор и микрокомпьютер выполнены с возможностью выделять в принятом биорадиолокационном сигнале модуляции, обусловленные дыханием и сердцебиением человека, определять частоту пульса и частоту дыхания обследуемого, а также гониометр выполнен с возможностью вычисления амплитуды отклонений кресла, обусловленных изменением положения тела обследуемого, далее с помощью алгоритмов, сопоставляют характер предъявляемой видео-аудио-текстовой информации с психофизиологическими реакциями обследуемых на ее предъявление, под реакциями понимаются изменение частоты дыхания, частоты сердцебиения, изменение поз, микрокомпьютер также выполнен с возможностью расчета оценки психофизиологического состояния, на основании чего делают вывод о психофизиологической надежности переговорщиков.Технический результат, достигаемый заявленной совокупностью признаков, заключается в упрощении контроля исправности и работоспособности устройства. 8 з.п. ф-лы.

Title: MULTI BIOMETRIC TERMINAL AND ACCESS CONTROL SYSTEM HAVING THE SAME
Abstract: One embodiment of the present invention relates to a multi biometric device including a host system capable of recognizing two or more physical features. A host system comprises a biodata input unit capable of acquiring biodata of a user; and a biodata identification unit comparing the obtained biodata with biodata of the user registered in advance and performing identification. The biodata input unit receives a plurality of pieces of biodata from a body when the user body approaches in a non-contact state. The host system is housed in one module or one housing.
Keywords: ["biodata identification unit", "recognizing physical", "features host comprises", "device including host", "multi biometric"]

Title: Intelligent water gauge reading method and system and equipment
Abstract: The invention discloses an intelligent water gauge reading method and system and equipment. The method comprises the steps that collected video streaming of intelligent water gauge readings is subjected to robust pretreatment; on the basis of a canny operator, water level detection is conducted on video streaming data obtained after pretreatment, and the position of the water surface is obtained;by means of a training model, the scale meaning of an intelligent water gauge is identified, and the height of the water level is calculated on the basis of the position of the water surface. Accordingly, the actual problems such as the accuracy, real-time performance and robustness of the water gauge are effectively solved; in addition, the system and equipment corresponding to the method are provided, the defects in the aspects of the speed, precision and the like of an original algorithm are overcome, the intelligent water gauge can work reliably in the scenes under the bad conditions suchas haze and night, and the system and equipment are widely applicable to industries needing water gauge identification in multiple scenes.
Keywords: ["water level", "overcome intelligent water", "performance robustness water", "gauge readings subjected", "gauge reading method"]

Title: Planning method of participation of electric vehicles in demand-side response, device and computing device
Abstract: The present invention discloses a planning method of the participation of electric vehicles in demand-side response, a planning device of the participation of the electric vehicles in demand-side response and a computing device. The method includes the following steps that: an electric vehicle expense model is established, wherein the electric vehicle expense model includes a minimum expense function for minimizing electric vehicle spare capacity expenses; the operating cost model of an independent system operator is established, wherein the operating cost model includes an operating cost function for calculating and adjusting the actual energy expenses of operating services; a system consumption model is established, wherein the system consumption model includes a consumption cost function for calculating expenses corresponding to conventional costs; corresponding constraints are constructed for the electric vehicle expense model , the operating cost model and the system consumption model; a system cost planning model is generated on the basis of the electric vehicle expense model, the operating cost model and the system consumption model; and the optimal solution of the system cost planning model is obtained so as to optimize the planning of the participation of the electric vehicles in the demand side response.
Keywords: ["electric vehicle", "demand response planning", "operating cost model", "participation electric vehicles", "consumption cost function"]

Title: DEEPSIMULATOR METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR MIMICKING NANOPORE SEQUENCING
Abstract: A method for sequencing biopolymers. The method includes selecting (700) with a sequence generator module (104) an input nucleotide sequence (260) having plural k-mers; simulating (702) with a deep learning simulator (100), actual electrical current signals (270) corresponding to the input nucleotide sequence (260); identifying (704) reads (240') that correspond to the actual electrical current signals (270); and displaying (706) the reads (240'). The deep learning simulator (100) includes a context-dependent deep learning model (106A) that takes into consideration a position of a k-mer of the plural k-mers on the input nucleotide sequence (206) when calculating a corresponding actual electrical current.
Keywords: ["biopolymers", "biopolymers method includes", "mers input nucleotide", "700 sequence generator", "method sequencing"]

Title: Object Detection and Property Determination for Autonomous Vehicles
Abstract: Systems, methods, tangible non-transitory computer-readable media, and devices for detecting objects are provided. For example, the disclosed technology can obtain a representation of sensor data associated with an environment surrounding a vehicle. Further, the sensor data can include sensor data points. A point classification and point property estimation can be determined for each of the sensor data points and a portion of the sensor data points can be clustered into an object instance based on the point classification and point property estimation for each of the sensor data points. A collection of point classifications and point property estimations can be determined for the portion of the sensor data points clustered into the object instance. Furthermore, object instance property estimations for the object instance can be determined based on the collection of point classifications and point property estimations for the portion of the sensor data points clustered into the object instance.
Keywords: ["classifications point property", "points clustered object", "estimation sensor data", "instance property estimations", "devices detecting objects"]

Title: Circuit hidden danger analysis method, device and electronic terminal
Abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a line hidden trouble analysis method, a device and an electronic terminal, which are applied to transmission line patrol inspection. The method comprises thefollowing steps: determining a target monitoring area based on point cloud data, wherein the target monitoring area comprises a target line and a tree; Determining a hidden trouble interval accordingto the target line; Judging a tree entering the hidden danger section as a tree barrier; Calculating a characteristic parameter of the barrier according to the point cloud data corresponding to the barrier, the characteristic parameter including an area or a height. Calculating the characteristic parameters of the barriers can help the staff to understand the overall situation of the barriers in the whole transmission line, help to estimate the workload of clearing the barriers, and thus determine how many staff members need to be sent and how many tools need to be used to speed up the progress of clearing the barriers.
Keywords: ["determining target monitoring", "transmission line", "barriers determine staff", "line patrol", "inspection method comprises"]

Title: ELECTRONIC MESSAGE CLASSIFICATION AND DELIVERY USING A NEURAL NETWORK ARCHITECTURE
Abstract: A system for electronic message classification and delivery using a neural network architecture includes one or more computing devices associated with one or more users, and at least one computer processing system in communication with one or more computing devices over at least one network. The at least one computer processing system includes at least one processor operatively coupled to a memory device and configured to execute program code stored on the memory device to receive one or more inputs associated with one or more e-mails corresponding to the one or more users across the at least one network, classify the one or more e-mails by performing natural language processing based on one or more sets of filters conditioned on respective ones of the one or more inputs, and permit the one or more users access to the one or more classified e-mails via the one or more computing devices.
Keywords: ["classification delivery", "users computer processing", "neural network architecture", "inputs associated mails", "electronic message"]

Title: Coastal wetland bird detection method
Abstract: The invention discloses a coastal wetland bird detection method, and the method comprises the steps: fusing detail information facilitating the positioning of a small-size target and high-level semantic information facilitating the recognition into a high-resolution feature map through the feature fusion by using a convolutional neural network; obtaining a region of interest through the region ofinterest generation network; obtaining a foreground area through an area object network; and further screening out the region of interest in the foreground region, thereby realizing the detection andidentification of the birds in the coastal wetland. According to the method, the problem of poor detection performance of a large number of small-size birds in a distant view in coastal wetland bird detection in the prior art can be solved, and the detection success rate and accuracy of small-size targets in coastal wetland bird detection can be greatly improved.
Keywords: ["birds distant view", "andidentification birds coastal", "wetland according method", "discloses coastal wetland", "bird detection prior"]

Title: OBJECT DETECTION
Abstract: A global object detection system comprising a plurality of local object detection systems, each arranged to monitor a respective area and comprising: an image capture device arranged to capture imagedata from its respective area; an illumination device for emitting light into its respective area; a local object detector for detecting objects in that area; a data interface for transmitting data from the local object detector to a central, remote image processing system; wherein the local object detector is configured to: control the illumination source to emit light having an identifiable characteristic; apply local image processing to the captured image data to detect objects in that area, as an absence of the identifiable characteristic in a shadow region created by the object; in response to an object being detected, transmit a portion of the image data including the detected object to the remote image processing system for further processing.
Keywords: ["detect objects area", "detection systems", "processing local object", "image processing local", "object detector configured"]

Title: method and equipment for intelligently scheduling a multi-OCR engine
Abstract: The invention relates to a method for intelligently scheduling multiple OCR engines, and the method comprises the following steps: calling an OCR application interface to upload a to-be-identified file, and assigning the type of the to-be-identified file; determining consumption types of OCR engines for processing the file according to the type of the file to be identified, creating an OCR queue corresponding to each consumption type of OCR engine, and setting at least one OCR engine of each consumption type; When the to-be-identified file requests to enter the OCR queue corresponding to the OCR engine, firstly executing overtime detection for judging whether the OCR engine of the consumption type is overtime or not, and if not, enabling the to-be-identified file to enter the correspondingOCR queue, overtime, incapability of enqueuing and informing a user. The method has the advantages that the advantages of the OCR recognition engines of all consumption types are fully utilized to achieve high-performance and high-accuracy recognition, all the OCR recognition engines are dispatched in order, and queue congestion, system errors and engine paralysis are prevented.
Keywords: ["types ocr engines", "setting ocr engine", "enter ocr queue", "ocr engine consumption", "scheduling multiple ocr"]

Title: An implementation method of an artificial intelligence judgment system for elevator inspection and examination
Abstract: The invention discloses an implementation method of an artificial intelligence judgment system for elevator examination. The implementation method comprises the steps that an examination simulation site is arranged; Before an examination is started, the identity of an examination person is identified through face recognition detection; After the examination is started, the camera is controlled byintelligent vision and artificial intelligence algorithm software to shoot the examination personnel and the examination site at an optimal angle according to the examination question and progress, and video image data and audio data picked up by the sound pick-up are uploaded to the upper computer; And an intelligent vision and artificial intelligence algorithm in the upper computer automaticallyreads processing results of the examination personnel on the examination questions, namely simulative fault code states and whether reaction actions and answers questions are correct or not. Examiners applying the system can normally complete examination answers or actions, namely simulated fault processing, like an evaluation teacher in an examination site in a simulation scene, and on the basisthat the system automatically reads the equipment fault code state to judge whether a fault is repaired or not, the artificial intelligence system makes correct judgment.
Keywords: ["detection examination", "repaired artificial intelligence", "examination answers actions", "implementation method artificial", "judgment elevator"]

Title: Signal acquisition acquisition circuit, signal acquisition method and wearable device
Abstract: The invention provides a signal acquisition circuit, a signal acquisition method and a wearable device, and relates to the field of integrated circuit technology. The method amplifies a first surfaceelectromyogram signal through a preamplifier unit in the signal acquisition circuit to obtain a second surface electromyogram signal, and extracts a first low frequency of the second surface electromyogram signal through the baseline drift suppression unit in the signal acquisition circuit, and carries out the subtraction of the second surface electromyogram signal and the first low frequency signal to obtain a first high frequency signal, and filters the first high frequency signal by a filtering unit in the signal acquisition circuit to obtain a target signal. The first low frequency signalin the second surface electromyogram signal is extracted by adding a baseline drift suppression unit in the signal acquisition circuit, and the second surface electromyogram signal and the first low frequency signal are subtracted, thereby eliminating the baseline drift caused by the first low frequency signal which improves the stability of the target signal.
Keywords: ["electromyogram signal low", "invention provides signal", "amplifies surfaceelectromyogram signal", "method wearable device", "acquisition circuit signal"]

Title: A cloud computing platform computing task cost prediction method and system based on resource characteristics
Abstract: The invention discloses a cloud computing platform computing task cost prediction method and system based on resource characteristics. The method comprises the implementation steps that a command of apredicted computing task is analyzed to obtain a command parameter; main characteristic parameter independent variables are extracted from the command parameters obtained through analysis through principal component analysis; the main characteristic parameter independent variables are input into a pre-trained machine learning model to obtain the prediction cost of the predicted calculation task;The machine learning model establishes an input and output mapping relation between the main characteristic parameter independent variable and the prediction cost of the predicted calculation task through pre-training. Command parameters input by a user are analyzed and collected; A machine learning algorithm is used for predicting the cost of an algorithm task, more comprehensive resource characteristic parameters can be obtained to serve as independent variables of the machine learning algorithm to meet data training and prediction, interference of invalid resource characteristic parameterson cost prediction is reduced, and the method has the advantage of being accurate in prediction.
Keywords: ["task machine learning", "platform computing task", "parameterson cost prediction", "prediction cost predicted", "cloud computing platform"]

Title: Method and device for determining complaint classification model and computer readable storage medium
Abstract: The embodiment of the invention discloses a complaint classification model determination method and device and a computer readable storage medium, and the method comprises the steps: obtaining at least one complaint classification according to a classification result of first complaint data; Wherein the first complaint data comprises historical complaint data; Determining a complaint expression corresponding to the at least one complaint classification according to the first complaint data corresponding to the at least one complaint classification; Determining a complaint classification modelaccording to the complaint expression, Wherein the complaint classification model is used for determining complaint classification corresponding to the second complaint data, and the second complaintdata at least comprises complaint data except the first complaint data.
Keywords: ["data complaint data", "comprises complaint data", "discloses complaint classification", "classification according complaint", "complaint classification modelaccording"]

Title: An insect recognition method based on three-dimensional simulation
Abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of insect identification. The invention discloses an insect identification method based on three-dimensional simulation, which is provided with a processorbox body, a camera photographing module is fixed in the middle of the processor box body through screws, a sound collecting module is installed beside the camera photographing module through screws,and a glass cover is installed on the surface of the processor box body through a rotating shaft. The camera shooting module is connected with a picture data memory, the picture data memory is connected with a picture binary processor, and the picture binary processor is connected with a picture feature sampler. The sound acquisition module is connected with the sound data memory, and the sound data memory is connected with the sound characteristic sampler. The picture feature sampler is coupled to a central processing unit which transfers data to a data comparison analyzer together with the sound feature sampler. By collecting and comparing the appearance pictures and sound information, we can accurately analyze the insect species, so that ordinary people can quickly grasp the important information of the insect.
Keywords: ["sound collecting module", "memory sound data", "picture feature sampler", "invention discloses insect", "insect identification method"]

Title: Dynamic ink price production and sale system realized based on big data
Abstract: The invention discloses a dynamic ink price production and sale system realized based on big data. The system is realized based on flexible package printing ink. a unique identity identification codeis arranged on the ink packaging bag. The system comprises a data center, an identity recognition module, a wireless transmitting module, an order supply and demand module, a production management module, a logistics management module, a comprehensive processing module and a client module. An online e-commerce network platform and an offline physical store can be compatible; an internet big data analysis technology is adopted; Through supply-demand interaction and virtual operation, the dynamic production cost and the dynamic purchase price of products are calculated from five aspects of demand, production, sales, financial and operation, supply-demand coordination and reasonable resource matching are achieved, the cost of production enterprises and printing enterprises is reduced, the advantages of the Internet + are brought into full play, an industrial chain can be optimized, and balanced development of the supply-demand relation of the printing industry is promoted.
Keywords: ["dynamic production", "discloses dynamic ink", "ink price", "commerce network platform", "module online commerce"]

Title: METHOD OF PROVIDING A DATASET FOR THE ADDITIVE MANUFACTURE AND CORRESPONDING QUALITY CONTROL METHOD
Abstract: A method of providing a dataset for additive manufacturing includes collecting a first type of data for the dataset during the additive buildup of a at least one layer of a component to be manufactured, evaluating of the structural quality of the layer by the first type of data, modifying the first type of data in that fractions of the data representing an insufficient structural quality of the layer are deleted from the first type of data, and superimposing second type of data, to the first type of data, wherein the second type of data is suitable to support a validation of the structural quality of the as-manufactured component.
Keywords: ["manufacturing includes collecting", "validation structural quality", "data superimposing", "data dataset", "additive buildup layer"]

Title: Small body gravitational field modeling method based on gaussian process regression
Abstract: The invention discloses a small body gravitational field modeling method based on gaussian process regression GPR, and belongs to the technical field of deep space exploration. The implementation method comprises the following steps: using the spherical coordinates of a field point near a small body, and obtaining a training set of gravitational field data through a polyhedron method; and using the obtained training set to establish a gaussian process regression GPR model. Then, a gravitational field at the position of a checking point is predicted to obtain a mapping relationship between thefield point and gravitation acceleration, namely modeling calculation is carried out on the gravitational field near the small body quickly and accurately by using the gaussian process regression GPRmethod, and the calculated amount can be reduced, so that the modeling speed is improved, and the requirement of online calculation is met. The method can be applied to deep space exploration, technical support and reference are provided for the establishment of a dynamics environment around the small body in a small body exploration task, and associated engineering problems are solved.
Keywords: ["set gravitational field", "gaussian process regression", "gravitation acceleration modeling", "gpr model", "small body gravitational"]

Title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR TIME SERIES ARTIFICIAL NEURAL NETWORK ELECTRIC VEHICLE POWER DEMAND PREDICTION, USING SPATIO-TEMPORAL FUSION OF POWER DEMAND DATA AND HETEROGENEOUS DATA
Abstract: The present invention relates to a method and an apparatus for time series artificial neural network electric vehicle power demand prediction, using spatio-temporal fusion of power demand data and heterogeneous data To this end, provided are: an encoding step of allowing an encoder to apply embedded heterogeneous data to embedded power demand data by using an embedded layer and an attention layer having been previously learned on the basis of the embedded power demand data and the embedded heterogeneous data, and generating encoding data for the heterogeneous data and power demand; and a decoder step of applying an attention weight of an embedded decoder to input heterogeneous data of the decoder and encoded power demand data by inputting encoded heterogeneous data and past prediction data in an embedding layer in a manner similar to that of the encoding step. Therefore, electric vehicle charging demand prediction and electric vehicle power demand prediction can be precisely performed with respect to series and region.
Keywords: ["series artificial neural", "vehicle power demand", "demand data heterogeneous", "prediction data embedding", "neural network electric"]

Title: ESTABLISHING ACCESS TO A SECURE NETWORK BASED ON USER-CREATED CREDENTIAL INDICIA
Abstract: In various aspects, code-based indicia contain secured network access credentials. In some aspects, a computer processor receives user input that specifies secured network access credentials, and the computer processor creates or modifies credentials for establishing a secured network connection. In these aspects, the computer processor generates code-based indicia that contain at least part of the secured network access credentials. In other aspects, a computer processor scans the code-based indicia and extracts the network access credentials. In these aspects, the computer processor employs the network access credentials to establish the secured network connection. In additional aspects, a network router apparatus renders the code-based indicia to an active display. In further aspects, a network router apparatus conditions grant of network access to a device on receipt from the device of an answer to a security question included in the secured network access credentials.
Keywords: ["processor employs network", "router apparatus", "credentials aspects computer", "code based indicia", "secured network connection"]

Title: A medical image segmentation method combining a filtering strategy and a fuzzy C-means
Abstract: The invention relates to a medical image segmentation method combining a filtering strategy and a fuzzy C-means, and the method comprises the following steps: reading a medical image, and carrying outthe median filtering of the medical image; Transforming the medical image into a frequency domain through WFT; selecting a threshold function for noise filtering; performing WFT inverse transformation on the filtered image; Initializing the distances from the clustering center and the sample points to the clustering center, and then updating the membership matrix and the clustering center; calculating a target function value, if the maximum iteration frequency is reached or the absolute value error of the two target function values is smaller than the target function precision, stopping calculation, otherwise, continuing iteration; and outputting a clustering center and various membership values, completing the division of fuzzy clustering, and outputting a segmented image. According to the method, the intuitionistic fuzzy set information is utilized, so that the effects of enhancing the noise resistance and improving the segmentation accuracy are achieved, and the actual problem of high-precision segmentation of the medical image is solved.
Keywords: ["fuzzy set", "medical image", "median filtering medical", "segmentation method", "fuzzy clustering outputting"]

Title: AUTONOMOUS VEHICLE PLANNING AND PREDICTION
Abstract: A computer-implemented method of predicting an external actor trajectory comprises receiving, at a computer, sensor inputs for detecting and tracking an external actor; applying object tracking to the sensor inputs, in order track the external actor, and thereby determine an observed trace of the external actor over a time interval; determining a set of available goals for the external actor; for each of the available goals, determining an expected trajectory model; and comparing the observed trace of the external actor with the expected trajectory model for each of the available goals, to determine a likelihood of that goal.
Keywords: ["external actor time", "actor determine observed", "track external", "trajectory model available", "method predicting external"]

Title: COMPUTER SYSTEM RELIABILITY THROUGH COMBINATION OF CERTIFIABLE SOFTWARE AND QUALIFIABLE SOFTWARE
Abstract: To provide a method of improving reliability of a computer system.SOLUTION: A computer system 100 executes a certifiable software application and a qualifiable software application. The certifiable software application is composed of static program instructions executed sequentially for the computer system to process input data to produce an output. The qualifiable software application uses a model iteratively built using a machine learning algorithm to process the input data to produce a corresponding output. The output is cross-checked by comparison with the corresponding output. When the comparison indicates that the output differs from the corresponding output by "more than a threshold", an alert of "the output unverified" is generated.SELECTED DRAWING: None
Keywords: ["machine learning algorithm", "software application certifiable", "algorithm process input", "improving reliability computer", "output qualifiable"]

Title: Self-adaptive feature selection and time consistency robust correlation filtering visual tracking method
Abstract: The invention discloses a self-adaptive feature selection and time consistency robust correlation filtering visual tracking method, and relates to a computer vision technology. The elastic network andthe time consistency constraint are introduced into related filtering learning at the same time. The method has the advantages that the discriminative features can be adaptively selected to inhibit the interference features, model learning and updating can be combined together, the problems of poor discriminative property and time-dependent degradation of a traditional related filter can be effectively solved, and the robustness of the algorithm to shielding, deformation, rotation and background interference is improved. Through the elastic network and the time consistency constraint, the correlation filter adaptively selects discriminative features which are continuous in time and have regional characteristics. The derived correlation filtering learning problem can be solved through an ADMM, and the problem can be efficiently solved only through a few iterations. And better performance can be obtained, the precision is high, and the speed is high.
Keywords: ["visual tracking", "discriminative features adaptively", "self adaptive feature", "constraint correlation filter", "filtering learning time"]

Title: Network test template construction method, power network test method and related device
Abstract: The invention provides a network test template construction method, a power network test method and a related device. The network test template construction method comprises the steps of obtaining a power network equipment evaluation standard file; identifying a preset field in the power network equipment evaluation standard file through a text identification mode, and extracting file content information corresponding to the key field, the file content information comprising test item information, test interface information, test configuration parameter information, test index information andindex type information; and creating a network test template according to the file content information, and associating the test items of the network test template with the interfaces of the test toolsoftware one by one according to the test interface information. Therefore, all test contents can be automatically connected with corresponding test software for testing according to the network testtemplate, human factors of the test are reduced to the maximum extent, and the technical problem that the accuracy of a test result is influenced due to a relatively high manual operation error rateis solved.
Keywords: ["test interface information", "items network test", "network testtemplate human", "test template construction", "power network test"]

Title: Intelligent equipment control method and device
Abstract: The application provides an intelligent equipment control method and device; and the intelligent equipment control method comprises the following steps: acquiring voice information of a user; converting the voice information into an intelligent equipment control instruction; and sending the intelligent equipment control instruction to intelligent equipment, wherein the intelligent equipment control instruction is used for controlling the intelligent equipment. According to the intelligent equipment control method and device in the application, the control over the intelligent equipment is realized in a voice control mode, so that both hands of the user can be well liberated, and the user can flexibly use the double hands while controlling the intelligent equipment.
Keywords: ["used controlling intelligent", "intelligent equipment realized", "control method device", "method device intelligent", "equipment control instruction"]

Title: PREDICTION DEVICE, PREDICTION METHOD, AND PROGRAM
Abstract: Provided are a prediction device, a prediction method, and a program for predicting effective policy measures. The prediction device (1) is provided with: a storage unit (14) which stores policy measure implementation information (144) representing a policy measure effect in a first target in which a policy measure has been implemented; and a control unit (13) which, on the basis of the policy measure implementation information, predicts a policy measure effect in a second target in which a policy measure has not been implemented. The control unit: creates a first graph (450A to 450D) which comprises a plurality of nodes including at least one first node associated with the first target and at least one second node associated with the second target, and a plurality of links connecting the nodes on the basis of similarity between the nodes; determines the degree of policy measure effect at the first node on the basis of the policy measure implementation information; and, in the first graph, transfers the degree of policy measure effect to the second node using the first node as a base point.
Keywords: ["effect target policy", "basis policy measure", "measure implemented control", "prediction device", "predicting effective policy"]

Title: Fingerprint collector detection auxiliary equipment
Abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of information acquisition accessory devices, and especially relates to a fingerprint collector detection auxiliary device. The working modes of the device can be increased, fingerprints on the fingerprint collector can be conveniently cleaned after detection work, and convenience is brought to a user; the device comprises a case, a baffle, two setsof sliding rails, a supporting plate, a fluorescent lamp, a camera, a transmission mechanism and a storage mechanism, a working cavity is formed in the case, sliding grooves are formed in the two sets of sliding rails, the transmission mechanism is installed in the working cavity, and the input end and the output end of the transmission mechanism are electrically connected with the camera and thestorage mechanism respectively; the device further comprises a movable motor, a connecting plate, a movable frame, a servo motor, a threaded pipe, a threaded rod, a driving plate, a chain, a cleaningmotor and a cleaning plate, a fixed plate is arranged on the driving plate, the cleaning plate is located at the output end of the cleaning motor, a sponge mat is arranged on the cleaning plate, anda driving chain wheel and a driven chain wheel are arranged at the output end of the servo motor and the threaded pipe respectively.
Keywords: ["field information acquisition", "collector detection auxiliary", "accessory devices especially", "relates fingerprint", "mechanism respectively device"]

Title: DIGITAL IDENTITY AUTHENTICATION METHOD, DEVICE, APPARATUS AND SYSTEM, AND STORAGE MEDIUM
Abstract: A digital identity authentication method, device, apparatus and system, and a computer-readable storage medium. The digital identity authentication method is applied to a blockchain platform and comprises: in response to a digital identity information acquisition request sent by a user terminal, sending a digital identity information ciphertext of a target user to the user terminal, so that the user terminal decrypts the digital identity information ciphertext to generate a digital identity information plaintext; and in response to a digital identity information acquisition request sent by a verification terminal, sending the digital identity information ciphertext of the target user and a security level to the verification terminal, so that the verification terminal determines whether the digital identity information ciphertext matches the digital identity information plaintext submitted by the user terminal, and if yes, performing security verification corresponding to the security level on the user terminal. The present invention can meet the customized demands for various authentication modes, and improves the security and reliability of digital identity authentication.
Keywords: ["authentication modes", "authentication method applied", "matches digital identity", "authentication method device", "digital identity information"]

Title: Barcode abnormity detection method based on artificial intelligence
Abstract: The invention discloses a barcode abnormity detection method based on artificial intelligence without pre-configuration. The method comprises the following steps: (1) when label data are less, judgingwhether a bar code obtained by code scanning is abnormal by adopting a basic statistical rule, and adding the bar code conforming to the basic statistical rule into a normal label data group and adding the bar code not conforming to the basic statistical rule into an abnormal label data group; 2) when the label data reaches an initial set value, predicting whether the bar code obtained by code scanning is abnormal by adopting an abnormality detection algorithm, and manually confirming whether the bar code is added into an abnormal label data set or a normal label data set; and (3) when the label data reaches a certain quantity, judging whether the input of the bar code is abnormal or not by adopting a classification prediction algorithm for the input bar code, performing manual confirmation, adding an abnormal label data set if the detected suspected abnormal bar code is determined to be abnormal, and otherwise, adding a normal label data set. The method can be used for abnormal judgment of various bar codes.
Keywords: ["adding bar code", "input bar code", "judgingwhether bar code", "invention discloses barcode", "barcode abnormity detection"]

Title: METHOD, APPARATUS AND ELECTRONIC DEVICE FOR BLOCKCHAIN TRANSACTIONS
Abstract: no Abstract
Keywords: ["electronic", "method apparatus", "blockchain transactions", "", ""]

Title: Automatic driving method and device
Abstract: The invention provides an automatic driving method and device, relates to the technical field of artificial intelligence and can balance flexibility and safety of driving strategies. The method comprises steps that a first confidence and a second confidence of a target vehicle are acquired, the first confidence level characterizes the credibility of the environmental information of the surroundingenvironment in which the target vehicle is located, and the second confidence characterizes the self-state information of the target vehicle and the credibility of corresponding to the state information of a potential interaction target object of the target vehicle; a first driving strategy is acquired according to the first confidence and the second confidence; a third driving strategy is acquired according to the first driving strategy and a second driving strategy based on preset rules, and the third driving strategy is utilized to control automatic driving of the target vehicle. The method is advantaged in that the method is applied to automatic driving control of the vehicle.
Keywords: ["confidence driving strategy", "safety driving strategies", "driving method device", "automatic driving target", "applied automatic driving"]

Title: Manifold space-based clustering method for adaptive neighborhood graph learning
Abstract: The invention discloses a manifold space-based clustering method for adaptive neighborhood graph learning. The method comprises the following steps of multi-dimensional data with a complex non-linearstructure such as images and videos are processed; a traditional spectral clustering method utilizes the similarity between Laplacian constraint learning data to easily cause the problem that the global structure of the data is explained mistakenly, and self-adaptive neighborhood regularization is introduced after a self-expression-based unified framework is established on a Grassmann manifold, sothat the clustering performance of multi-dimensional data of a video or image set is improved. The invention relates to the fields of manifold learning, pattern recognition, machine learning and thelike, the multi-view clustering effect for image and video high-dimensional data is obviously superior to that of other classic clustering methods, and the recognition capability is effectively improved.
Keywords: ["graph learning method", "utilizes similarity laplacian", "view clustering", "manifold space based", "adaptive neighborhood regularization"]

Title: Multi-modal voice interaction feedback response control method, computer readable storage medium and air conditioner
Abstract: The invention provides a multi-modal voice interaction feedback response control method, a computer readable storage medium and an air conditioner. After receiving and recognizing voice signals from different identifiers, a system sends different response commands to a voice control terminal; and the voice control terminal executes operation according to the different response commands. Accordingto the method, the different response commands are set for special crowds, after the voice signals of the different identifiers are received, the corresponding response commands are quickly matched, and the response commands can ensure that the special crowds can feel the response commands, so that the smart product is higher in applicability.
Keywords: ["provides multi modal", "response commands smart", "voice control terminal", "interaction feedback response", "crowds voice signals"]

Title: Natural language understanding method based on pre-training model
Abstract: The invention discloses a natural language understanding method based on a pre-training model. The method comprises the following steps: establishing a pre-training model based on a bidirectional depth Transformer; carrying out word segmentation processing on the to-be-understood statement, and respectively adding special tags at the beginning and the end of the to-be-understood statement to obtain a text vector of the to-be-understood statement; taking the text vector of the to-be-understood statement as input, and calling the pre-training model to obtain a text semantic vector of the to-be-understood statement; performing intention recognition; and performing entity identification. According to the method, intentions can be accurately and comprehensively understood, entities can be recognized, and a solid foundation is provided for subsequent conversations. The quality and the user experience of the man-machine conversation system can be remarkably improved.
Keywords: ["conversations quality user", "understood entities recognized", "text semantic vector", "intention recognition performing", "man machine conversation"]

Title: Face part distance measuring method and device and vehicle-mounted terminal
Abstract: The embodiment of the invention discloses a human face part distance measuring method and device and a vehicle-mounted terminal. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring a face image to besubjected to distance measuring acquired by a camera; according to a plurality of pre-constructed basic face point cloud models and a conversion matrix between the image coordinate system and the camera coordinate system, determining a target weight of each basic face point cloud model capable of fitting to obtain a real face point cloud model, and a target conversion matrix between the head coordinate system and the camera coordinate system; fitting each basic face point cloud model according to each target weight to obtain a real face point cloud model; converting the real face point cloud model into a camera coordinate system according to the target conversion matrix to obtain a target face point cloud model; and according to the target face point cloud model, determining distance information between a specified part in the face image and the camera. By applying the scheme provided by the embodiment of the invention, human face part distance measurement can be carried out on the human face image shot by the monocular camera.
Keywords: ["human face image", "obtain target face", "model determining distance", "head coordinate camera", "besubjected distance measuring"]

Title: BUILDING SYSTEM WITH SEMANTIC MODELING BASED CUSTOM LOGIC GENERATION
Abstract: A building system for implementing user defined logic includes one or more memory devices configured to store instructions thereon, that, when executed by one or more processors, cause the one or more processors to receive user input from a user device, the user input providing a natural language description of a building logic application for a piece of building equipment. The instructions cause the one or more processors to retrieve a semantic logic application comprising a semantic description of the building logic application based on the natural language description and a semantic building model comprising a semantic building description of the piece of building equipment, generate a custom logic application based on the semantic logic application, the natural language description, and the semantic building model, and operate the custom logic application.
Keywords: ["building model", "application comprising semantic", "building model operate", "semantic description building", "user defined logic"]

Title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR OBTAINING ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE MODEL, DEVICE, AND STORAGE MEDIUM
Abstract: A method and apparatus for obtaining an artificial intelligence (AI) model, a device, and a storage medium. In an example of clients executing the method, clients receive a first AI model sent from a server (303), wherein the first AI model comprises a plurality of neurons; the clients determine, among the plurality of neurons, target neurons participating in the current round of training, wherein the current round of training is not the first round of training, and the number of target neurons is less than the total number of the plurality of neurons (304); the clients train the target neurons on the basis of local data (305); the clients return parameter data corresponding to the target neurons to the server (306), wherein the parameter data corresponding to the target neurons is used by the server to obtain a convergent target AI model. The target neurons are trained according to an active condition without training all the neurons in the model, thereby reducing power consumption and accelerating the training speed. Also, the clients merely transmit parameters corresponding to trained neurons to the server, thereby saving communication bandwidth.
Keywords: ["ai model comprises", "trained neurons", "clients receive ai", "neurons server 306", "neurons server saving"]

Title: Automatic ball feeding method and device and ball feeder
Abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of computers, and provides an automatic ball feeding method and a device and a ball feeder, and the automatic ball feeding method comprises the steps: inputting user swing motion data into a classification model, and outputting a result which is used for representing that the difficulty degree of ball hitting corresponding to a swing motion is not classified yet; and acquiring ball feeding parameter information based on the classification result and the current position information of the user, and sending the ball to the ball hitting point of the user according to the ball feeding parameter information. Therefore, the classification result corresponding to the racket swinging action can be determined by inputting the classification model according to the racket swinging action data of different users, and the classification result can represent the ball hitting difficulty degree required by the corresponding user, so that the ball feeding parameter information can be determined according to the ball hitting difficulty degrees of the different users; and accurate ball feeding can be achieved flexibly according to user requirements.
Keywords: ["swing motion classified", "swinging action data", "ball feeding method", "provides automatic ball", "according racket swinging"]

Title: Small and medium-sized navigation channel bridge monitoring device
Abstract: The invention provides a small and medium-sized navigation channel bridge monitoring device characterized in that the device is arranged on a small and medium-sized bridge and directly facing a navigation channel so as to monitor a ship target in the navigation channel, is arranged on the bridge and comprises a camera which is arranged on the small and medium-sized bridge, directly faces the center line of the navigation channel and is used for shooting the navigation channel so as to obtain a corresponding real-time monitoring video; a radar which is arranged on small and medium-sized bridgesand is at least used for continuously scanning the navigation channel and obtaining a real-time scanning position when a ship target is scanned; a warning module which is used for sending an acousto-optic warning to a ship target in the navigation channel; and a central processing unit in communication connection with the camera, the radar and the warning module, wherein the central processing unit comprises a neural network model storage part, a monitoring information acquisition cache part, a ship target identification part, a video coordinate conversion part, a radar coordinate conversionpart, a data fusion part, a track information identification part, a track prediction part and an early warning analysis output part.
Keywords: ["channel bridge", "ship target navigation", "continuously scanning navigation", "channel monitor", "bridge monitoring device"]

Title: No-reference three-dimensional image quality evaluation method based on interactive convolutional neural network
Abstract: The invention discloses a no-reference stereo image quality evaluation method based on an interactive convolutional neural network. The no-reference stereo image quality evaluation method comprises the following steps: step 1, fusing central eye images; step 2, carrying out image non-overlapping dicing segmentation and local normalization; 3, establishing an interactive convolutional neural network; and 4, calculating the quality score of the whole three-dimensional image. According to the method, a binocular fusion mechanism is considered, the central eye image is generated through the left view and the right view of the three-dimensional image, training is completed through the locally normalized image blocks to achieve quality prediction of the three-dimensional image, and reference-free objective image quality evaluation which is more accurate and higher in consistency with human subjective feelings is achieved.
Keywords: ["binocular fusion mechanism", "discloses reference stereo", "eye image generated", "network reference stereo", "image quality evaluation"]

Title: Risk assessment model training method and device and risk assessment method and device
Abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a risk assessment model training method and device and a risk assessment method and device. In the training method, a batch of user samples are collected, eachuser sample comprises a user feature and a risk label, and the risk label is used for indicating a total risk score of a user and a plurality of individual risk scores corresponding to predeterminedrisk types. The feature coding layer is trained based on the user features of each user sample and the total risk score in the risk label to obtain a trained feature coding layer, and a feature codingresult of each user sample is obtained based on the trained feature coding layer. The comprehensive risk assessment layer is trained based on the feature coding result of each user sample and the total risk score in the risk label. For each single risk assessment layer in the single risk assessment layers, the single risk assessment layer is trained based on the feature coding result of each usersample and the single risk score of the corresponding risk type in the risk tag.
Keywords: ["comprehensive risk assessment", "training method device", "feature coding layer", "device risk assessment", "risk score user"]

Title: SYSTEM AND METHOD OF DOCUMENTING CONDITION, REPAIR, AND OVERHAUL OF AIRCRAFT PARTS
Abstract: A system and method of documenting condition, repair, and overhaul of aircraft parts. The system and method include searching a database for an electronic file of an aircraft part; creating an electronic file of the aircraft part if the electronic file is not found on the database; generating a maintenance report data package that is linked to the electronic file; capturing, using a camera or a microphone, aircraft part data including a single or plurality of pictures, a video recording, and a voice recording; linking the aircraft part data to the maintenance report data package; and saving an updated version of the electronic file to the database.
Keywords: ["overhaul aircraft", "linking aircraft data", "electronic file", "documenting", "documenting condition repair"]

Title: Positioning method and device
Abstract: The invention discloses a positioning method and device. According to the scheme, the method comprises the steps of: pre-storing a corresponding relationship between each position in a map and each feature in a semantic feature library; when an unmanned vehicle needs to be positioned, determining the basic positioning information of the unmanned vehicle by extracting semantic features from an image collected by the unmanned vehicle and then matching the semantic features with pre-stored semantic features; and correcting the basic positioning information of the unmanned vehicle according to thelane where the unmanned vehicle is located so as to obtain final positioning information of the unmanned vehicle. According to the positioning method provided by the abstract of the specification, the positioning information of the unmanned vehicle can be obtained by analyzing the image information around the unmanned vehicle, the positioning mode is simple, the cost is low, and the positioning precision is relatively high.
Keywords: ["image information unmanned", "according positioning method", "discloses positioning method", "unmanned vehicle according", "position map feature"]

Title: Control method and electronic equipment
Abstract: The invention discloses a control method and electronic equipment. The control method is applied to the electronic equipment. The electronic equipment comprises a display screen and an imaging device.The control method comprises the following steps: controlling the imaging device to acquire an image to obtain eye information of a current user; processing the eye information to judge whether the pupil area of the current user exceeds a preset pupil range or not, wherein the minimum value of the preset pupil range is a first preset value, and the maximum value of the preset pupil range is a second preset value; after the pupil area is smaller than a first preset value and lasts for a first preset duration, controlling the display screen to lower the display brightness; and after the pupil area is greater than a second preset value and lasts for a second preset duration, controlling the display screen to increase the display brightness. Therefore, the display brightness of the display screen can be adjusted according to the pupil area, so that the display brightness is more matched with the requirements of the eyes of the user.
Keywords: ["method electronic equipment", "control method applied", "controlling display screen", "display brightness pupil", "pupil range preset"]

Title: Audio packet loss repairing method, device and system based on neural network
Abstract: The invention discloses an audio packet loss restoration method, device and system based on a neural network, and the method comprises the steps: obtaining an audio data packet which comprises a plurality of audio data frames, wherein the plurality of audio data frames at least comprise a plurality of speech signal frames; determining the position of the lost speech signal frame in the plurality of audio data frames to obtain the position information of the lost frame, wherein the position comprises a first preset position or a second preset position; selecting a neural network model for repairing the frame loss condition according to the position information of the frame loss, wherein the neural network model comprises a first repairing model and a second repairing model; and sending theplurality of audio data frames to the selected neural network model so as to repair the lost speech signal frames. According to the method, the restoration model can be adaptively selected, the restoration of the lost speech signal frame is more targeted, and then the restoration accuracy is improved.
Keywords: ["speech signal frames", "method restoration", "loss neural network", "restoration model", "audio data packet"]

Title: GENERATING NATIVE CODE WITH DYNAMIC REOPTIMIZATION FOR ENSEMBLE TREE MODEL PREDICTION
Abstract: Aspects of the invention include a computer-implemented method that receives, by a processor, an ensemble decision tree and generates, by the processor, native code from the ensemble decision tree. The method compiles, by the processor, the native code into machine language and scores, by the processor, the execution time of the native code. The method dynamically reoptimizes, by the processor, portions of the native code corresponding to the most traversed portion of the ensemble decision tree.
Keywords: ["decision tree", "computer implemented", "native code corresponding", "method compiles processor", "ensemble decision"]

Title: Gesture-controlled AR space visual three-dimensional reconstruction method
Abstract: The invention discloses an AR space visual three-dimensional reconstruction method controlled through gestures. The method comprises the following steps: 1, carrying out joint calibration on an AR glasses camera and a depth camera C1; 2, determining a bounding box surrounding a target object through gesture interaction; 3, starting three-dimensional reconstruction; 4, the client side carries out visualization, and virtual and real registration is achieved at the same time; 5, the user pauses the three-dimensional reconstruction process through gestures and checks the current three-dimensional reconstruction progress; 6, the target object is moved and rotated to a new observation angle, and then the three-dimensional reconstruction algorithm is restarted through gestures; and 7, ending a three-dimensional reconstruction algorithm through gestures, and outputting a virtual model. According to the AR space visual three-dimensional reconstruction method based on gesture control, the current result of three-dimensional reconstruction can be seen in real time at the AR end, and the reconstruction process is controlled by using the human body natural gesture action based on the gesture sensor.
Keywords: ["object gesture interaction", "gestures ending dimensional", "method based gesture", "ar space visual", "reconstruction process gestures"]

Title: Seat for shoulder joint training rehabilitation apparatus
Abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of medical instruments, in particular to a seat for a shoulder joint training rehabilitation apparatus, which comprises a seat body (1), the seat body (1) comprises seat legs (2), a seat plate (3) and a seat backrest (4), the bottoms of the seat legs (2) are movable, a head fixing part (6) and a shoulder fixing part (7) are arranged at the upper part of the backrest of the seat plate (3), and the head fixing part (6) and the shoulder fixing part (7) are fixed on the seat plate (3). The shoulder fixing parts (7) are connected with the seat backrest (4) in a hinged mode, the upper portions of the shoulder fixing parts (7) extend to the position below the chest from the two sides of the shoulders respectively, and the lower portions of the shoulder fixing parts (7) intersect with each other. When matched with a rehabilitation device for training, the head, shoulder and neck fixing device has the functions of fixing the head, the shoulders and the neck, hot compressing the shoulders and the neck and releasing muscular soreness, the combination effect of the three parts is more remarkable during training, a patient feels more comfortable, and the device is suitable for being popularized and used.
Keywords: ["neck fixing device", "joint training rehabilitation", "upper backrest", "seat plate shoulder", "rehabilitation apparatus comprises"]

Title: Color-based stacked three-dimensional code encoding method, encoding device, decoding method, decoding device and storage medium
Abstract: The invention discloses a color-based stacked three-dimensional code encoding method, encoding device, decoding method, decoding device and storage medium, and belongs to the technical field of three-dimensional codes. The encoding method comprises the following steps: acquiring to-be-encoded data, and partitioning the to-be-decoded data according to a preset specification to generate data blocks;generating a two-dimensional code of the same specification for each data block; and superposing the RGB color value of each two-dimensional code pixel to obtain a three-dimensional code formed by superposing multiple layers of two-dimensional codes. The method is simple in implementation mode and high in encoding and decoding speed, the data capacity is three times that of a two-dimensional codewith the same pixel, image data cannot be recognized or cracked by other tools after being encoded, the safety in the image data transmission process is guaranteed, and the requirement of an enterprise for information confidentiality is met. The problems that an existing image encoding method is low in data volume expression quantity and low in transmission speed are solved.
Keywords: ["encoded data partitioning", "existing image encoding", "code pixel", "codes method", "layers dimensional codes"]

Title: Rolling bearing early fault diagnosis method based on bandwidth Fourier decomposition
Abstract: The invention relates to a rolling bearing early fault diagnosis method based on bandwidth Fourier decomposition, and the method comprises the steps: decomposing an original signal into sparse narrow-band sub-signals in a frequency domain through a bandwidth Fourier decomposition algorithm, and converting each narrow-band sub-signal into a bandwidth mode function of a time domain through inverse Fourier transform; after an original vibration signal is decomposed into a bandwidth modal function, solving an envelope spectrum of the bandwidth modal function through Hilbert transform, and calculating a fault characteristic frequency ratio of the bandwidth modal function, and finally, selecting the bandwidth modal function with the maximum fault characteristic frequency ratio, and analyzing theenvelope spectrum characteristics of the bandwidth modal function, so that effective diagnosis of early faults of the rolling bearing is realized. The method has the characteristics of high calculation speed and high fault identification precision, and can be effectively applied to diagnosis of early weak faults of the rolling bearing.
Keywords: ["high fault identification", "diagnosis method based", "transform calculating fault", "bandwidth fourier decomposition", "rolling bearing early"]

Title: Transformer fault detection method, system and device based on sudden drop of three-phase current curve and storage medium
Abstract: The invention discloses a transformer fault detection method, system and device based on sudden drop of a three-phase current curve and a storage medium. The method comprises the following steps: 1) loading three-phase current data in a transformer work order; 2) standardizing the three-phase current data in the transformer work order; 3) performing classification training on the fast training vector machine by using the standardized three-phase current data in the transformer work order; and 4) inputting the work order three-phase current data of the to-be-tested transformer into the rapid training vector machine after classification training, judging whether the work order of the to-be-tested transformer is correctly recorded or not according to the rapid training vector machine after classification training, calculating the accurate fault moment of the to-be-tested transformer by utilizing a prony algorithm when the work order of the to-be-tested transformer is correctly recorded, otherwise, judging that the transformer operates normally, and the work order of the to-be-tested transformer records errors; according to the method, system and device and the storage medium, whetherthe fault work order record is correct or not can be judged, and meanwhile the accurate transformer fault time can be judged.
Keywords: ["transformer records errors", "moment tested transformer", "order tested transformer", "fault detection method", "transformer rapid training"]

Title: PRIVACY SECURITY ASSESSMENT METHOD AND APPARATUS, SERVER, AND STORAGE MEDIUM
Abstract: Disclosed are a privacy security assessment method and apparatus, a server, and a storage medium. An assessment report generating method comprises: acquiring application information of a target application, the application information comprising information to be assessed corresponding to multiple privacy security assessment items; obtaining assessment scores of corresponding privacy security assessment items according to the information to be assessed in the application information; and generating a privacy security assessment result for the target application according to the assessment score of each privacy security assessment item. The present method can provide users with intuitive privacy security assessment results, so that users can learn the privacy security conditions of applications.
Keywords: ["disclosed privacy security", "assessment method", "assessment method apparatus", "scores corresponding privacy", "generating privacy security"]

Title: LLR ESTIMATION FOR SOFT DECODING
Abstract: A method of soft decoding received signals. The method comprising defining quantisation intervals for a signal value range, determining a number of bits in each quantisation interval that are connected to unsatisfied constraints, providing, the number of bits in each quantisation interval that are connected to unsatisfied constraints, as an input to a trained model, wherein the trained model has been trained to cover an operational range of a device for soft decoding of signals, determining, using the trained model, a log likelihood ratio for each quantisation interval, and performing soft decoding using the log likelihood ratios.
Keywords: ["signals method comprising", "received signals", "bits quantisation", "method soft", "decoding using log"]

Title: Multi-source knife switch state judgment method based on EIM platform
Abstract: The invention provides a multi-source knife switch state judgment method based on an EIM platform, and the method comprises the following steps: obtaining knife switch related monitoring information collected in the EIM platform, and carrying out the classification, coding and control code design of the knife switch related monitoring information; acquiring unstructured information in the relatedmonitoring information of the knife switch, and preprocessing the unstructured information; determining and presetting thresholds according to the data attributes and characteristics, and respectivelysetting knife switch state judgment standards; and selecting more than three types of data through a control code, and performing fusion analysis according to the judgment result of the knife switchstate judgment standard to obtain a knife switch state judgment result. According to the invention, the selection logic of multi-source data fusion is combined to realize multi-dimensional accurate description of the on-off state of the substation knife switch, so that the state of the knife switch is accurately judged.
Keywords: ["substation knife switch", "switchstate judgment standard", "knife switch accurately", "multi source knife", "switch related monitoring"]
